    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Excel 2010: impressão, inserção de objetos, campos predefinidos, controle de quebras e numeração de páginas, obtenção de dados externos, classificação de dados' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-PowerPoint 2010: estrutura básica das apresentações, conceitos de slides, anotações, régua, guias, cabeçalhos e rodapés' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-PowerPoint 2010: noções de edição e formatação de apresentações, inserção de objetos, numeração de páginas, botões de ação, animação e transição entre slides' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'Correio Eletrônico: uso de correio eletrônico, preparo e envio de mensagens, anexação de arquivos' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'Internet: Navegação na Internet, conceitos de URL, links, sites, busca e impressão de páginas' },

    // --- REDAÇÃO / QUESTÕES ---
    { s: 'REDAÇÃO', t: 'Texto dissertativo-argumentativo (em prosa), de acordo com a norma-padrão da língua portuguesa' },
    { s: 'REDAÇÃO', t: 'Leitura e compreensão de textos auxiliares como referencial para ampliar os argumentos' },
    { s: 'REDAÇÃO', t: 'Domínio dos mecanismos de coesão e coerência textual' },
    { s: 'QUESTÕES', t: 'Resolução de 10 Questões de cada matéria do dia' }
];

export const Body: React.FC<BodyProps> = ({ workoutLogs, tasks }) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'body' | 'mind'>('body');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  // --- WORKOUT STATE ---
  const [workoutProfile, setWorkoutProfile] = useState<WorkoutProfile | null>(null);
  const [workoutFormData, setWorkoutFormData] = useState<Partial<WorkoutProfile>>({
    sex: 'Masculino', age: 30, weight: 75, goal: 'hypertrophy', limitations: 'Nenhuma'
  });
  const [workoutPlan, setWorkoutPlan] = useState<any>(null);

  // --- STUDY STATE ---
  const [studyTopics, setStudyTopics] = useState<StudyTopic[]>(() => {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem('nexus_study_topics_v3');
      if (saved) return JSON.parse(saved);
      
      // Initialize raw syllabus into stateful topics
      return RAW_SYLLABUS.map((item, index) => ({
          id: `topic_${index}`,
          subject: item.s,
          topic: item.t,
          completed: false
      }));
  });

  const [currentDay, setCurrentDay] = useState<string>(WEEK_DAYS[new Date().getDay() === 0 ? 6 : new Date().getDay() - 1]);
  const [currentWeek, setCurrentWeek] = useState<number>(1);

  useEffect(() => {
      localStorage.setItem('nexus_study_topics_v3', JSON.stringify(studyTopics));
  }, [studyTopics]);

  // --- HANDLERS ---
  const handleGenerateWorkout = async () => {
    if (!workoutFormData.age) return;
    const p = workoutFormData as WorkoutProfile;
    setWorkoutProfile(p);
    setLoading(true);
    const aiPlan = await generateWorkoutPlan(p);
    setWorkoutPlan(aiPlan);
    setLoading(false);
  };

  const toggleTopic = (id: string) => {
      setStudyTopics(prev => prev.map(t => 
          t.id === id ? { ...t, completed: !t.completed } : t
      ));
  };

  // Logic: Get subjects for the day, then find the SPECIFIC topic for the current week (1 topic per week logic)
  const getDailyPlan = () => {
      const subjects = SCHEDULE[currentDay] || [];
      
      return subjects.map(subject => {
          // Get all topics for this subject
          const allTopicsForSubject = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject);
          
          // Determine which topic corresponds to the current week
          // Week 1 -> Index 0, Week 2 -> Index 1, etc.
          const topicIndex = currentWeek - 1;
          
          // If we have ran out of topics, return null or a generic review
          const specificTopic = allTopicsForSubject[topicIndex];
          
          return {
              subject,
              topic: specificTopic,
              totalTopics: allTopicsForSubject.length
          };
      });
  };

  const getSubjectProgress = (subject: string) => {
      const total = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject).length;
      if (total === 0) return 0;
      const done = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject && t.completed).length;
      return Math.round((done / total) * 100);
  };

  // Filter study tasks for the history log
  const studyLogs = tasks.filter(t => t.category === 'study' && t.completed).sort((a,b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());

  const dailyPlan = getDailyPlan();

  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-8 h-full flex flex-col gap-6 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">
        
        {/* --- HEADER: LARGE SPLIT BUTTONS --- */}
        <div className="flex w-full gap-4 md:gap-8 h-32 md:h-40 shrink-0">
            {/* LEFT SIDE: BODY */}
            <button 
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('body')}
                className={`flex-1 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 group relative overflow-hidden ${
                    activeTab === 'body' 
                    ? 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)]' 
                    : 'bg-slate-800/50 border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:border-slate-600 opacity-60 hover:opacity-100'
                }`}
            >
                {activeTab === 'body' && <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/10 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>}
                <Dumbbell size={32} className={`transition-transform duration-300 ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'scale-110 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 group-hover:text-emerald-400'}`} />
                <div>
                    <span className={`text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest block ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-emerald-400'}`}>CORPO</span>
                    <span className={`text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] block text-center ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'text-emerald-200' : 'text-slate-600'}`}>Alta Performance</span>
                </div>
            </button>

            {/* RIGHT SIDE: MIND */}
            <button 
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('mind')}
                className={`flex-1 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 group relative overflow-hidden ${
                    activeTab === 'mind' 
                    ? 'bg-purple-600 border-purple-400 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(147,51,234,0.3)]' 
                    : 'bg-slate-800/50 border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:border-slate-600 opacity-60 hover:opacity-100'
                }`}
            >
                {activeTab === 'mind' && <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/10 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>}
                <Brain size={32} className={`transition-transform duration-300 ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'scale-110 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`} />
                <div>
                    <span className={`text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest block ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`}>MENTE</span>
                    <span className={`text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] block text-center ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'text-purple-200' : 'text-slate-600'}`}>Cognição & Estudo</span>
                </div>
            </button>
        </div>

        {/* --- BODY TAB CONTENT (WORKOUT) --- */}
        {activeTab === 'body' && (
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-8 animate-fade-in flex-1">
                
                {/* Generator Section (NOW FIRST) */}
                <div className="w-full space-y-6">
                    {!workoutPlan ? (
                         <div className="bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 space-y-4 shadow-lg">
                            <h3 className="text-white font-bold flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-slate-700 pb-2 mb-2">
                                <Zap className="text-emerald-500"/> Gerador de Protocolo Físico
                            </h3>
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                                <div>
                                    <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Peso (kg)</label>
                                    <input type="number" value={workoutFormData.weight} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, weight: Number(e.target.value)})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors" />
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Idade</label>
                                    <input type="number" value={workoutFormData.age} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, age: Number(e.target.value)})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors" />
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div>
                                <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Objetivo Principal</label>
                                <select value={workoutFormData.goal} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, goal: e.target.value as any})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors">
                                    <option value="hypertrophy">Hipertrofia (Ganho de Massa)</option>
                                    <option value="weight_loss">Perda de Gordura / Definição</option>
                                    <option value="conditioning">Condicionamento Atlético</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>

                            <button 
                                onClick={handleGenerateWorkout}
                                disabled={loading}
                                className="w-full bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-white font-bold py-4 rounded-lg flex justify-center items-center gap-2 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-emerald-900/20 mt-2"
                            >
                                {loading ? <RotateCcw className="animate-spin" /> : <Activity />}
                                {loading ? 'Processando Biotipo...' : 'Gerar Plano de Treino IA'}
                            </button>
                         </div>
                    ) : (
                        <div className="space-y-4 animate-fade-in">
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-emerald-900/20 p-4 rounded-xl border border-emerald-500/30">
                                 <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-emerald-400 flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <CheckCircle size={20}/> {workoutPlan.focus}
                                 </h3>
                                 <span className="text-emerald-300 font-mono text-sm bg-emerald-900/50 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-emerald-500/30">{workoutPlan.durationMinutes} min</span>
                            </div>
                             <div className="flex justify-end">
                                <button onClick={() => setWorkoutPlan(null)} className="text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white underline">Gerar Novo Protocolo</button>
                             </div>

                            <div className="grid gap-4">
                                {workoutPlan.exercises?.map((ex: any, idx: number) => (
                                    <div key={idx} className="bg-slate-800 p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 hover:border-emerald-500/50 transition-colors flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-start md:items-center">
                                        <div className="bg-slate-900 text-slate-400 w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full font-bold text-xs shrink-0 border border-slate-700">
                                            {idx + 1}
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="flex-1">
                                            <h4 className="font-bold text-white text-lg mb-1">{ex.name}</h4>
                                            <p className="text-sm text-emerald-400/80 italic flex items-start gap-2">
                                                <Lightbulb size={14} className="shrink-0 mt-0.5" /> {ex.tip}
                                            </p>
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="flex gap-2 text-sm text-slate-300 font-mono shrink-0">
                                            <span className="bg-slate-900 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-slate-700 text-center min-w-[80px]">{ex.sets} Séries</span>
                                            <span className="bg-slate-900 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-slate-700 text-center min-w-[80px]">{ex.reps} Reps</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    )}
                </div>

                {/* Logs Section (NOW LAST) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 h-fit">
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <History size={18} className="text-emerald-400" /> Histórico de Treinos
                    </h3>
                    <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
                        {workoutLogs.length === 0 && <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Nenhum treino registrado via Chat ainda.</p>}
                        {workoutLogs.slice().reverse().map(log => (
                            <div key={log.id} className="border-l-2 border-emerald-500 pl-3 py-1">
                                <p className="text-white font-medium text-sm">{log.description}</p>
                                <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{new Date(log.date).toLocaleString()}</p>
                            </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

        {/* --- MIND TAB CONTENT (FIXED STUDY CHECKLIST) --- */}
        {activeTab === 'mind' && (
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 animate-fade-in flex-1">
                
                {/* 1. WEEK CONTROLLER */}
                <div className="bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 p-4 flex items-center justify-between">
                     <button 
                        onClick={() => setCurrentWeek(prev => Math.max(1, prev - 1))}
                        className="p-2 bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-600 rounded-lg text-white transition-colors"
                        disabled={currentWeek === 1}
                     >
                         <ChevronLeft size={20} />
                     </button>
                     <div className="text-center">
                         <span className="text-xs font-bold text-purple-400 uppercase tracking-widest block mb-1">Cronograma Atual</span>
                         <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white">SEMANA {currentWeek}</h2>
                     </div>
                     <button 
                        onClick={() => setCurrentWeek(prev => prev + 1)}
                        className="p-2 bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-600 rounded-lg text-white transition-colors"
                     >
                         <ChevronRight size={20} />
                     </button>
                </div>

                {/* 2. DAY SELECTOR (Seg-Dom) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 overflow-hidden">
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-7 text-center">
                        {WEEK_DAYS.map(day => {
                            const isSelected = currentDay === day;
                            const isWeekend = day === 'Sábado' || day === 'Domingo';
                            return (
                                <button
                                    key={day}
                                    onClick={() => setCurrentDay(day)}
                                    className={`
                                        py-4 text-sm font-bold transition-colors relative
                                        ${isSelected ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-700 hover:text-white'}
                                        ${isWeekend && !isSelected ? 'bg-slate-900/50' : ''}
                                    `}
                                >
                                    <span className="hidden md:inline">{day}</span>
                                    <span className="md:hidden">{day.slice(0, 3)}</span>
                                    {isSelected && <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-1 bg-white/50"></div>}
                                </button>
                            );
                        })}
                    </div>
                </div>

                {/* 3. SUBJECTS FOR THE DAY (FILTERED BY WEEK) */}
                <div className="space-y-6">
                    {dailyPlan.length === 0 && (
                        <div className="p-8 text-center text-slate-500 bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-slate-700">
                            Dia Livre! Aproveite para descansar ou adiantar revisões.
                        </div>
                    )}

                    {dailyPlan.map(plan => {
                        const { subject, topic, totalTopics } = plan;
                        const progress = getSubjectProgress(subject);
                        
                        return (
                            <div key={subject} className="bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 overflow-hidden shadow-lg transition-all hover:border-purple-500/30">
                                {/* Subject Header */}
                                <div className="p-5 bg-slate-900/80 border-b border-slate-700 flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                                        <div className="p-2 bg-purple-900/50 text-purple-400 rounded-lg border border-purple-500/30">
                                            <BookMarked size={20} />
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white tracking-wide">{subject}</h3>
                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                                                <div className="w-24 h-1.5 bg-slate-700 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                                    <div className="h-full bg-purple-500 transition-all duration-500" style={{width: `${progress}%`}}></div>
                                                </div>
                                                <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 font-mono">{progress}% Concluído</span>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <span className="text-xs bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 font-mono">
                                        Aula {currentWeek} / {totalTopics}
                                    </span>
                                </div>

                                {/* Current Week Topic */}
                                <div className="p-6">
                                    {!topic ? (
                                        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 text-slate-500">
                                            <CheckCircle className="mb-2 opacity-50" size={32} />
                                            <p className="font-medium">Conteúdo desta matéria finalizado!</p>
                                            <p className="text-sm">Parabéns, você completou todos os tópicos cadastrados.</p>
                                        </div>
                                    ) : (
                                        <button
                                            onClick={() => toggleTopic(topic.id)}
                                            className={`w-full text-left p-5 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all group flex items-start gap-4 
                                                ${topic.completed 
                                                    ? 'bg-purple-900/10 border-purple-500/30' 
                                                    : 'bg-slate-700/30 border-slate-600 hover:border-purple-400 hover:bg-slate-700/50'
                                                }`}
                                        >
                                            <div className={`mt-0.5 transition-all ${topic.completed ? 'text-purple-400' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`}>
                                                {topic.completed ? <CheckSquare size={24} /> : <Square size={24} />}
                                            </div>
                                            <div>
                                                <span className="block text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-1 text-slate-400">
                                                    Tópico da Semana {currentWeek}
                                                </span>
                                                <span className={`text-lg font-medium transition-colors leading-relaxed ${topic.completed ? 'text-slate-500 line-through decoration-slate-600' : 'text-white'}`}>
                                                    {topic.topic}
                                                </span>
                                            </div>
                                        </button>
                                    )}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        );
                    })}
                </div>

                {/* Logs Section (NOW LAST) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 h-fit mt-4">
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <History size={18} className="text-purple-400" /> Histórico de Estudos (Cronômetro)
                    </h3>
                    <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
                        {studyLogs.length === 0 && <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Nenhum estudo cronometrado registrado nas tarefas.</p>}
                        {studyLogs.map(log => (
                            <div key={log.id} className="border-l-2 border-purple-500 pl-3 py-1 group">
                                <p className="text-white font-medium text-sm group-hover:text-purple-300 transition-colors">{log.title}</p>
                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-1">
                                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{new Date(log.date).toLocaleDateString()}</p>
                                    <span className="text-[10px] bg-purple-900/50 text-purple-300 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">{log.durationMinutes} min</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

        {/* Footer Space */}
        <div className="mt-8 pt-8 border-t border-slate-800/50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-600 gap-2 pb-8">
            <div className="w-1 h-1 bg-slate-700 rounded-full"></div>
            <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold opacity-50">Nexus 360</p>
            <ChevronDown className="animate-bounce opacity-30 mt-2" size={16} />
        </div>
    </div>
  );
};

**Refreshing Local Data Storage**

**Refining the Storage Update**

**Confirming Complete Implementation**

I'm presently confirming every piece is integrated. I've rechecked that all topics, and the interpretation ones are included. The storage key is correctly changed to `v4`. I am now assembling the XML output to be incorporated into the next build and making sure the format is right, based on the completed steps.

    { s: 'REDAÇÃO', t: 'Domínio dos mecanismos de coesão e coerência textual' },

export const Body: React.FC<BodyProps> = ({ workoutLogs, tasks }) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'body' | 'mind'>('body');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  // --- WORKOUT STATE ---
  const [workoutProfile, setWorkoutProfile] = useState<WorkoutProfile | null>(null);
  const [workoutFormData, setWorkoutFormData] = useState<Partial<WorkoutProfile>>({
    sex: 'Masculino', age: 30, weight: 75, goal: 'hypertrophy', limitations: 'Nenhuma'
  });
  const [workoutPlan, setWorkoutPlan] = useState<any>(null);

  // --- STUDY STATE ---
  const [studyTopics, setStudyTopics] = useState<StudyTopic[]>(() => {
      // BUMPED VERSION TO v4 TO FORCE SYLLABUS UPDATE
      const saved = localStorage.getItem('nexus_study_topics_v4');
      if (saved) return JSON.parse(saved);
      
      // Initialize raw syllabus into stateful topics
      return RAW_SYLLABUS.map((item, index) => ({
          id: `topic_${index}`,
          subject: item.s,
          topic: item.t,
          completed: false
      }));
  });

  const [currentDay, setCurrentDay] = useState<string>(WEEK_DAYS[new Date().getDay() === 0 ? 6 : new Date().getDay() - 1]);
  const [currentWeek, setCurrentWeek] = useState<number>(1);

  useEffect(() => {
      localStorage.setItem('nexus_study_topics_v4', JSON.stringify(studyTopics));
  }, [studyTopics]);

  // --- HANDLERS ---
  const handleGenerateWorkout = async () => {
    if (!workoutFormData.age) return;
    const p = workoutFormData as WorkoutProfile;
    setWorkoutProfile(p);
    setLoading(true);
    const aiPlan = await generateWorkoutPlan(p);
    setWorkoutPlan(aiPlan);
    setLoading(false);
  };

  const toggleTopic = (id: string) => {
      setStudyTopics(prev => prev.map(t => 
          t.id === id ? { ...t, completed: !t.completed } : t
      ));
  };

  // Logic: Get subjects for the day, then find the SPECIFIC topic for the current week (1 topic per week logic)
  const getDailyPlan = () => {
      const subjects = SCHEDULE[currentDay] || [];
      
      return subjects.map(subject => {
          // Get all topics for this subject
          const allTopicsForSubject = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject);
          
          // Determine which topic corresponds to the current week
          // Week 1 -> Index 0, Week 2 -> Index 1, etc.
          const topicIndex = currentWeek - 1;
          
          // If we have ran out of topics, return null or a generic review
          const specificTopic = allTopicsForSubject[topicIndex];
          
          return {
              subject,
              topic: specificTopic,
              totalTopics: allTopicsForSubject.length
          };
      });
  };

  const getSubjectProgress = (subject: string) => {
      const total = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject).length;
      if (total === 0) return 0;
      const done = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject && t.completed).length;
      return Math.round((done / total) * 100);
  };

  // Filter study tasks for the history log
  const studyLogs = tasks.filter(t => t.category === 'study' && t.completed).sort((a,b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());

  const dailyPlan = getDailyPlan();

  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-8 h-full flex flex-col gap-6 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">
        
        {/* --- HEADER: LARGE SPLIT BUTTONS --- */}
        <div className="flex w-full gap-4 md:gap-8 h-32 md:h-40 shrink-0">
            {/* LEFT SIDE: BODY */}
            <button 
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('body')}
                className={`flex-1 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 group relative overflow-hidden ${
                    activeTab === 'body' 
                    ? 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)]' 
                    : 'bg-slate-800/50 border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:border-slate-600 opacity-60 hover:opacity-100'
                }`}
            >
                {activeTab === 'body' && <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/10 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>}
                <Dumbbell size={32} className={`transition-transform duration-300 ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'scale-110 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 group-hover:text-emerald-400'}`} />
                <div>
                    <span className={`text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest block ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-emerald-400'}`}>CORPO</span>
                    <span className={`text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] block text-center ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'text-emerald-200' : 'text-slate-600'}`}>Alta Performance</span>
                </div>
            </button>

            {/* RIGHT SIDE: MIND */}
            <button 
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('mind')}
                className={`flex-1 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 group relative overflow-hidden ${
                    activeTab === 'mind' 
                    ? 'bg-purple-600 border-purple-400 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(147,51,234,0.3)]' 
                    : 'bg-slate-800/50 border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:border-slate-600 opacity-60 hover:opacity-100'
                }`}
            >
                {activeTab === 'mind' && <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/10 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>}
                <Brain size={32} className={`transition-transform duration-300 ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'scale-110 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`} />
                <div>
                    <span className={`text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest block ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`}>MENTE</span>
                    <span className={`text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] block text-center ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'text-purple-200' : 'text-slate-600'}`}>Cognição & Estudo</span>
                </div>
            </button>
        </div>

        {/* --- BODY TAB CONTENT (WORKOUT) --- */}
        {activeTab === 'body' && (
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-8 animate-fade-in flex-1">
                
                {/* Generator Section (NOW FIRST) */}
                <div className="w-full space-y-6">
                    {!workoutPlan ? (
                         <div className="bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 space-y-4 shadow-lg">
                            <h3 className="text-white font-bold flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-slate-700 pb-2 mb-2">
                                <Zap className="text-emerald-500"/> Gerador de Protocolo Físico
                            </h3>
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                                <div>
                                    <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Peso (kg)</label>
                                    <input type="number" value={workoutFormData.weight} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, weight: Number(e.target.value)})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors" />
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Idade</label>
                                    <input type="number" value={workoutFormData.age} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, age: Number(e.target.value)})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors" />
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div>
                                <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Objetivo Principal</label>
                                <select value={workoutFormData.goal} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, goal: e.target.value as any})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors">
                                    <option value="hypertrophy">Hipertrofia (Ganho de Massa)</option>
                                    <option value="weight_loss">Perda de Gordura / Definição</option>
                                    <option value="conditioning">Condicionamento Atlético</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>

                            <button 
                                onClick={handleGenerateWorkout}
                                disabled={loading}
                                className="w-full bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-white font-bold py-4 rounded-lg flex justify-center items-center gap-2 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-emerald-900/20 mt-2"
                            >
                                {loading ? <RotateCcw className="animate-spin" /> : <Activity />}
                                {loading ? 'Processando Biotipo...' : 'Gerar Plano de Treino IA'}
                            </button>
                         </div>
                    ) : (
                        <div className="space-y-4 animate-fade-in">
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-emerald-900/20 p-4 rounded-xl border border-emerald-500/30">
                                 <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-emerald-400 flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <CheckCircle size={20}/> {workoutPlan.focus}
                                 </h3>
                                 <span className="text-emerald-300 font-mono text-sm bg-emerald-900/50 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-emerald-500/30">{workoutPlan.durationMinutes} min</span>
                            </div>
                             <div className="flex justify-end">
                                <button onClick={() => setWorkoutPlan(null)} className="text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white underline">Gerar Novo Protocolo</button>
                             </div>

                            <div className="grid gap-4">
                                {workoutPlan.exercises?.map((ex: any, idx: number) => (
                                    <div key={idx} className="bg-slate-800 p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 hover:border-emerald-500/50 transition-colors flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-start md:items-center">
                                        <div className="bg-slate-900 text-slate-400 w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full font-bold text-xs shrink-0 border border-slate-700">
                                            {idx + 1}
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="flex-1">
                                            <h4 className="font-bold text-white text-lg mb-1">{ex.name}</h4>
                                            <p className="text-sm text-emerald-400/80 italic flex items-start gap-2">
                                                <Lightbulb size={14} className="shrink-0 mt-0.5" /> {ex.tip}
                                            </p>
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="flex gap-2 text-sm text-slate-300 font-mono shrink-0">
                                            <span className="bg-slate-900 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-slate-700 text-center min-w-[80px]">{ex.sets} Séries</span>
                                            <span className="bg-slate-900 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-slate-700 text-center min-w-[80px]">{ex.reps} Reps</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    )}
                </div>

                {/* Logs Section (NOW LAST) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 h-fit">
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <History size={18} className="text-emerald-400" /> Histórico de Treinos
                    </h3>
                    <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
                        {workoutLogs.length === 0 && <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Nenhum treino registrado via Chat ainda.</p>}
                        {workoutLogs.slice().reverse().map(log => (
                            <div key={log.id} className="border-l-2 border-emerald-500 pl-3 py-1">
                                <p className="text-white font-medium text-sm">{log.description}</p>
                                <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{new Date(log.date).toLocaleString()}</p>
                            </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

        {/* --- MIND TAB CONTENT (FIXED STUDY CHECKLIST) --- */}
        {activeTab === 'mind' && (
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 animate-fade-in flex-1">
                
                {/* 1. WEEK CONTROLLER */}
                <div className="bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 p-4 flex items-center justify-between">
                     <button 
                        onClick={() => setCurrentWeek(prev => Math.max(1, prev - 1))}
                        className="p-2 bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-600 rounded-lg text-white transition-colors"
                        disabled={currentWeek === 1}
                     >
                         <ChevronLeft size={20} />
                     </button>
                     <div className="text-center">
                         <span className="text-xs font-bold text-purple-400 uppercase tracking-widest block mb-1">Cronograma Atual</span>
                         <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white">SEMANA {currentWeek}</h2>
                     </div>
                     <button 
                        onClick={() => setCurrentWeek(prev => prev + 1)}
                        className="p-2 bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-600 rounded-lg text-white transition-colors"
                     >
                         <ChevronRight size={20} />
                     </button>
                </div>

                {/* 2. DAY SELECTOR (Seg-Dom) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 overflow-hidden">
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-7 text-center">
                        {WEEK_DAYS.map(day => {
                            const isSelected = currentDay === day;
                            const isWeekend = day === 'Sábado' || day === 'Domingo';
                            return (
                                <button
                                    key={day}
                                    onClick={() => setCurrentDay(day)}
                                    className={`
                                        py-4 text-sm font-bold transition-colors relative
                                        ${isSelected ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-700 hover:text-white'}
                                        ${isWeekend && !isSelected ? 'bg-slate-900/50' : ''}
                                    `}
                                >
                                    <span className="hidden md:inline">{day}</span>
                                    <span className="md:hidden">{day.slice(0, 3)}</span>
                                    {isSelected && <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-1 bg-white/50"></div>}
                                </button>
                            );
                        })}
                    </div>
                </div>

                {/* 3. SUBJECTS FOR THE DAY (FILTERED BY WEEK) */}
                <div className="space-y-6">
                    {dailyPlan.length === 0 && (
                        <div className="p-8 text-center text-slate-500 bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-slate-700">
                            Dia Livre! Aproveite para descansar ou adiantar revisões.
                        </div>
                    )}

                    {dailyPlan.map(plan => {
                        const { subject, topic, totalTopics } = plan;
                        const progress = getSubjectProgress(subject);
                        
                        return (
                            <div key={subject} className="bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 overflow-hidden shadow-lg transition-all hover:border-purple-500/30">
                                {/* Subject Header */}
                                <div className="p-5 bg-slate-900/80 border-b border-slate-700 flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                                        <div className="p-2 bg-purple-900/50 text-purple-400 rounded-lg border border-purple-500/30">
                                            <BookMarked size={20} />
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white tracking-wide">{subject}</h3>
                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                                                <div className="w-24 h-1.5 bg-slate-700 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                                    <div className="h-full bg-purple-500 transition-all duration-500" style={{width: `${progress}%`}}></div>
                                                </div>
                                                <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 font-mono">{progress}% Concluído</span>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <span className="text-xs bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 font-mono">
                                        Aula {currentWeek} / {totalTopics}
                                    </span>
                                </div>

                                {/* Current Week Topic */}
                                <div className="p-6">
                                    {!topic ? (
                                        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 text-slate-500">
                                            <CheckCircle className="mb-2 opacity-50" size={32} />
                                            <p className="font-medium">Conteúdo desta matéria finalizado!</p>
                                            <p className="text-sm">Parabéns, você completou todos os tópicos cadastrados.</p>
                                        </div>
                                    ) : (
                                        <button
                                            onClick={() => toggleTopic(topic.id)}
                                            className={`w-full text-left p-5 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all group flex items-start gap-4 
                                                ${topic.completed 
                                                    ? 'bg-purple-900/10 border-purple-500/30' 
                                                    : 'bg-slate-700/30 border-slate-600 hover:border-purple-400 hover:bg-slate-700/50'
                                                }`}
                                        >
                                            <div className={`mt-0.5 transition-all ${topic.completed ? 'text-purple-400' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`}>
                                                {topic.completed ? <CheckSquare size={24} /> : <Square size={24} />}
                                            </div>
                                            <div>
                                                <span className="block text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-1 text-slate-400">
                                                    Tópico da Semana {currentWeek}
                                                </span>
                                                <span className={`text-lg font-medium transition-colors leading-relaxed ${topic.completed ? 'text-slate-500 line-through decoration-slate-600' : 'text-white'}`}>
                                                    {topic.topic}
                                                </span>
                                            </div>
                                        </button>
                                    )}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        );
                    })}
                </div>

                {/* Logs Section (NOW LAST) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 h-fit mt-4">
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <History size={18} className="text-purple-400" /> Histórico de Estudos (Cronômetro)
                    </h3>
                    <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
                        {studyLogs.length === 0 && <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Nenhum estudo cronometrado registrado nas tarefas.</p>}
                        {studyLogs.map(log => (
                            <div key={log.id} className="border-l-2 border-purple-500 pl-3 py-1 group">
                                <p className="text-white font-medium text-sm group-hover:text-purple-300 transition-colors">{log.title}</p>
                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-1">
                                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{new Date(log.date).toLocaleDateString()}</p>
                                    <span className="text-[10px] bg-purple-900/50 text-purple-300 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">{log.durationMinutes} min</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

        {/* Footer Space */}
        <div className="mt-8 pt-8 border-t border-slate-800/50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-600 gap-2 pb-8">
            <div className="w-1 h-1 bg-slate-700 rounded-full"></div>
            <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold opacity-50">Nexus 360</p>
            <ChevronDown className="animate-bounce opacity-30 mt-2" size={16} />
        </div>
    </div>
  );
};

Com certeza. Fiz as seguintes alterações para ajustar o seu cronograma:

1.  **Segunda-feira:** Reorganizei a ordem para garantir que **Português** apareça com destaque. O código já continha a matéria, mas forcei a atualização para garantir que você a veja.
2.  **Domingo:** Adicionei o conteúdo da "sexta grade" (Sexta-feira), ou seja, **Redação** e **Questões**, ao cronograma de Domingo, conforme solicitado. Agora Domingo servirá como uma grande revisão de Exatas + Prática de Redação/Questões.

O sistema atualizará automaticamente para a versão mais recente do cronograma (`v5`).

entries.description: Updated Schedule to include Friday's content (Redação/Questões) on Sunday and ensured Portuguese is present on Monday. Bumped storage version to v5.

diffs.replacement:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { WorkoutProfile, WorkoutLog, Task, StudyTopic } from '../types';
import { generateWorkoutPlan } from '../services/geminiService';
import { Activity, Dumbbell, Zap, RotateCcw, CheckCircle, History, ChevronDown, Brain, BookOpen, CheckSquare, Square, CalendarDays, Trophy, BookMarked, Lightbulb, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';

interface BodyProps {
    workoutLogs: WorkoutLog[];
    tasks: Task[];
}

// --- CONSTANTS & DATA ---

const WEEK_DAYS = ['Segunda', 'Terça', 'Quarta', 'Quinta', 'Sexta', 'Sábado', 'Domingo'];

const SCHEDULE: Record<string, string[]> = {
    'Segunda': ['PORTUGUÊS', 'HISTÓRIA', 'FILOSOFIA'], // Reordered Portuguese to first to ensure visibility
    'Terça': ['FÍSICA', 'GEOGRAFIA', 'SOCIOLOGIA'],
    'Quarta': ['MATEMÁTICA', 'INFORMÁTICA', 'ING/ESP'],
    'Quinta': ['QUÍMICA', 'BIOLOGIA', 'DIREITO'],
    'Sexta': ['REDAÇÃO', 'QUESTÕES'],
    'Sábado': ['HISTÓRIA', 'GEOGRAFIA', 'FILOSOFIA', 'SOCIOLOGIA', 'PORTUGUÊS'], // Revisão Humanas/Linguagens
    'Domingo': ['MATEMÁTICA', 'FÍSICA', 'QUÍMICA', 'BIOLOGIA', 'DIREITO', 'REDAÇÃO', 'QUESTÕES'] // Revisão Exatas + Conteúdo de Sexta (Redação/Questões)
};

// Full Syllabus provided by user - UPDATED EXACTLY AS REQUESTED
const RAW_SYLLABUS = [
    // --- HISTÓRIA ---
    { s: 'HISTÓRIA', t: 'Os povos do Oriente Próximo e suas organizações políticas' },
    { s: 'HISTÓRIA', t: 'As cidades-estados da Grécia' },
    { s: 'HISTÓRIA', t: 'Formação, desenvolvimento e declínio do Império Romano do Ocidente' },
    { s: 'HISTÓRIA', t: 'A vida socioeconômica e religiosa dos mesopotâmicos, egípcios, fenícios e hebreus' },
    { s: 'HISTÓRIA', t: 'O legado cultural dos gregos e dos romanos' },

    // --- BIOLOGIA ---
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'CÉLULA: A unidade dos seres vivos' },

    // --- DIREITO ---
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'CONSTITUIÇÃO FEDERAL: Título II – Dos Direitos e Garantias Fundamentais: Capítulo I – Dos Direitos e Deveres Individuais e Coletivos' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'CF: Capítulo IV – Dos Direitos Políticos' },

    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'CF: Título V – Da Defesa do Estado e das Instituições Democráticas: Capítulo III – Da Segurança Pública' },
