    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'Const. SP: Título III – Da Organização do Estado: Capítulo I – Da Administração Pública: Seção I – Disposições Gerais' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'Const. SP: Capítulo II – Dos Servidores Públicos do Estado: Seção I – Dos Servidores Públicos Civis' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'Const. SP: Seção II – Dos Servidores Públicos Militares' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'Const. SP: Capítulo III – Da Segurança Pública: Seção I – Disposições Gerais; Seção III – Da Polícia Militar' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'LEI FEDERAL Nº 12.527/11 – Lei de Acesso à Informação' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'DECRETO nº 58.052/12 – Regulamenta a Lei nº 12.527/11' },

    // --- INFORMÁTICA ---
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Windows 10: conceito de pastas, diretórios, arquivos e atalhos, área de trabalho, área de transferência, manipulação de arquivos e pastas' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Windows 10: uso dos menus, programas e aplicativos, interação com o conjunto de aplicativos MS-Office 2010' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Word 2010: estrutura básica dos documentos, edição e formatação de textos, cabeçalhos, parágrafos, fontes, colunas' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Word 2010: marcadores simbólicos e numéricos, tabelas, impressão, controle de quebras e numeração de páginas, legendas, índices' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Word 2010: inserção de objetos, campos predefinidos, caixas de texto' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Excel 2010: estrutura básica das planilhas, conceitos de células, linhas, colunas, pastas e gráficos' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Excel 2010: elaboração de tabelas e gráficos, uso de fórmulas, funções e macros' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Excel 2010: impressão, inserção de objetos, campos predefinidos, controle de quebras e numeração de páginas, obtenção de dados externos, classificação de dados' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-PowerPoint 2010: estrutura básica das apresentações, conceitos de slides, anotações, régua, guias, cabeçalhos e rodapés' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-PowerPoint 2010: noções de edição e formatação de apresentações, inserção de objetos, numeração de páginas, botões de ação, animação e transição entre slides' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'Correio Eletrônico: uso de correio eletrônico, preparo e envio de mensagens, anexação de arquivos' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'Internet: Navegação na Internet, conceitos de URL, links, sites, busca e impressão de páginas' },

    // --- REDAÇÃO / QUESTÕES ---
    { s: 'REDAÇÃO', t: 'Texto dissertativo-argumentativo (em prosa), de acordo com a norma-padrão da língua portuguesa' },
    { s: 'REDAÇÃO', t: 'Leitura e compreensão de textos auxiliares como referencial para ampliar os argumentos' },
    { s: 'REDAÇÃO', t: 'Domínio dos mecanismos de coesão e coerência textual' },
    { s: 'QUESTÕES', t: 'Resolução de 10 Questões de cada matéria do dia' }
];

export const Body: React.FC<BodyProps> = ({ workoutLogs, tasks }) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'body' | 'mind'>('body');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  // --- WORKOUT STATE ---
  const [workoutProfile, setWorkoutProfile] = useState<WorkoutProfile | null>(null);
  const [workoutFormData, setWorkoutFormData] = useState<Partial<WorkoutProfile>>({
    sex: 'Masculino', age: 30, weight: 75, goal: 'hypertrophy', limitations: 'Nenhuma'
  });
  const [workoutPlan, setWorkoutPlan] = useState<any>(null);

  // --- STUDY STATE ---
  const [studyTopics, setStudyTopics] = useState<StudyTopic[]>(() => {
      // BUMPED VERSION TO v5 TO FORCE SYLLABUS UPDATE (Fixing Monday Portuguese & Sunday Review)
      const saved = localStorage.getItem('nexus_study_topics_v5');
      if (saved) return JSON.parse(saved);
      
      // Initialize raw syllabus into stateful topics
      return RAW_SYLLABUS.map((item, index) => ({
          id: `topic_${index}`,
          subject: item.s,
          topic: item.t,
          completed: false
      }));
  });

  const [currentDay, setCurrentDay] = useState<string>(WEEK_DAYS[new Date().getDay() === 0 ? 6 : new Date().getDay() - 1]);
  const [currentWeek, setCurrentWeek] = useState<number>(1);

  useEffect(() => {
      localStorage.setItem('nexus_study_topics_v5', JSON.stringify(studyTopics));
  }, [studyTopics]);

  // --- HANDLERS ---
  const handleGenerateWorkout = async () => {
    if (!workoutFormData.age) return;
    const p = workoutFormData as WorkoutProfile;
    setWorkoutProfile(p);
    setLoading(true);
    const aiPlan = await generateWorkoutPlan(p);
    setWorkoutPlan(aiPlan);
    setLoading(false);
  };

  const toggleTopic = (id: string) => {
      setStudyTopics(prev => prev.map(t => 
          t.id === id ? { ...t, completed: !t.completed } : t
      ));
  };

  // Logic: Get subjects for the day, then find the SPECIFIC topic for the current week (1 topic per week logic)
  const getDailyPlan = () => {
      const subjects = SCHEDULE[currentDay] || [];
      
      return subjects.map(subject => {
          // Get all topics for this subject
          const allTopicsForSubject = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject);
          
          // Determine which topic corresponds to the current week
          // Week 1 -> Index 0, Week 2 -> Index 1, etc.
          const topicIndex = currentWeek - 1;
          
          // If we have ran out of topics, return null or a generic review
          const specificTopic = allTopicsForSubject[topicIndex];
          
          return {
              subject,
              topic: specificTopic,
              totalTopics: allTopicsForSubject.length
          };
      });
  };

  const getSubjectProgress = (subject: string) => {
      const total = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject).length;
      if (total === 0) return 0;
      const done = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject && t.completed).length;
      return Math.round((done / total) * 100);
  };

  // Filter study tasks for the history log
  const studyLogs = tasks.filter(t => t.category === 'study' && t.completed).sort((a,b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());

  const dailyPlan = getDailyPlan();

  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-8 h-full flex flex-col gap-6 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">
        
        {/* --- HEADER: LARGE SPLIT BUTTONS --- */}
        <div className="flex w-full gap-4 md:gap-8 h-32 md:h-40 shrink-0">
            {/* LEFT SIDE: BODY */}
            <button 
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('body')}
                className={`flex-1 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 group relative overflow-hidden ${
                    activeTab === 'body' 
                    ? 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)]' 
                    : 'bg-slate-800/50 border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:border-slate-600 opacity-60 hover:opacity-100'
                }`}
            >
                {activeTab === 'body' && <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/10 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>}
                <Dumbbell size={32} className={`transition-transform duration-300 ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'scale-110 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 group-hover:text-emerald-400'}`} />
                <div>
                    <span className={`text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest block ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-emerald-400'}`}>CORPO</span>
                    <span className={`text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] block text-center ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'text-emerald-200' : 'text-slate-600'}`}>Alta Performance</span>
                </div>
            </button>

            {/* RIGHT SIDE: MIND */}
            <button 
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('mind')}
                className={`flex-1 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 group relative overflow-hidden ${
                    activeTab === 'mind' 
                    ? 'bg-purple-600 border-purple-400 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(147,51,234,0.3)]' 
                    : 'bg-slate-800/50 border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:border-slate-600 opacity-60 hover:opacity-100'
                }`}
            >
                {activeTab === 'mind' && <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/10 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>}
                <Brain size={32} className={`transition-transform duration-300 ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'scale-110 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`} />
                <div>
                    <span className={`text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest block ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`}>MENTE</span>
                    <span className={`text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] block text-center ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'text-purple-200' : 'text-slate-600'}`}>Cognição & Estudo</span>
                </div>
            </button>
        </div>

        {/* --- BODY TAB CONTENT (WORKOUT) --- */}
        {activeTab === 'body' && (
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-8 animate-fade-in flex-1">
                
                {/* Generator Section (NOW FIRST) */}
                <div className="w-full space-y-6">
                    {!workoutPlan ? (
                         <div className="bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 space-y-4 shadow-lg">
                            <h3 className="text-white font-bold flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-slate-700 pb-2 mb-2">
                                <Zap className="text-emerald-500"/> Gerador de Protocolo Físico
                            </h3>
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                                <div>
                                    <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Peso (kg)</label>
                                    <input type="number" value={workoutFormData.weight} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, weight: Number(e.target.value)})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors" />
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Idade</label>
                                    <input type="number" value={workoutFormData.age} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, age: Number(e.target.value)})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors" />
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div>
                                <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Objetivo Principal</label>
                                <select value={workoutFormData.goal} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, goal: e.target.value as any})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors">
                                    <option value="hypertrophy">Hipertrofia (Ganho de Massa)</option>
                                    <option value="weight_loss">Perda de Gordura / Definição</option>
                                    <option value="conditioning">Condicionamento Atlético</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>

                            <button 
                                onClick={handleGenerateWorkout}
                                disabled={loading}
                                className="w-full bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-white font-bold py-4 rounded-lg flex justify-center items-center gap-2 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-emerald-900/20 mt-2"
                            >
                                {loading ? <RotateCcw className="animate-spin" /> : <Activity />}
                                {loading ? 'Processando Biotipo...' : 'Gerar Plano de Treino IA'}
                            </button>
                         </div>
                    ) : (
                        <div className="space-y-4 animate-fade-in">
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-emerald-900/20 p-4 rounded-xl border border-emerald-500/30">
                                 <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-emerald-400 flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <CheckCircle size={20}/> {workoutPlan.focus}
                                 </h3>
                                 <span className="text-emerald-300 font-mono text-sm bg-emerald-900/50 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-emerald-500/30">{workoutPlan.durationMinutes} min</span>
                            </div>
                             <div className="flex justify-end">
                                <button onClick={() => setWorkoutPlan(null)} className="text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white underline">Gerar Novo Protocolo</button>
                             </div>

                            <div className="grid gap-4">
                                {workoutPlan.exercises?.map((ex: any, idx: number) => (
                                    <div key={idx} className="bg-slate-800 p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 hover:border-emerald-500/50 transition-colors flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-start md:items-center">
                                        <div className="bg-slate-900 text-slate-400 w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full font-bold text-xs shrink-0 border border-slate-700">
                                            {idx + 1}
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="flex-1">
                                            <h4 className="font-bold text-white text-lg mb-1">{ex.name}</h4>
                                            <p className="text-sm text-emerald-400/80 italic flex items-start gap-2">
                                                <Lightbulb size={14} className="shrink-0 mt-0.5" /> {ex.tip}
                                            </p>
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="flex gap-2 text-sm text-slate-300 font-mono shrink-0">
                                            <span className="bg-slate-900 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-slate-700 text-center min-w-[80px]">{ex.sets} Séries</span>
                                            <span className="bg-slate-900 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-slate-700 text-center min-w-[80px]">{ex.reps} Reps</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    )}
                </div>

                {/* Logs Section (NOW LAST) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 h-fit">
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <History size={18} className="text-emerald-400" /> Histórico de Treinos
                    </h3>
                    <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
                        {workoutLogs.length === 0 && <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Nenhum treino registrado via Chat ainda.</p>}
                        {workoutLogs.slice().reverse().map(log => (
                            <div key={log.id} className="border-l-2 border-emerald-500 pl-3 py-1">
                                <p className="text-white font-medium text-sm">{log.description}</p>
                                <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{new Date(log.date).toLocaleString()}</p>
                            </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

        {/* --- MIND TAB CONTENT (FIXED STUDY CHECKLIST) --- */}
        {activeTab === 'mind' && (
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 animate-fade-in flex-1">
                
                {/* 1. WEEK CONTROLLER */}
                <div className="bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 p-4 flex items-center justify-between">
                     <button 
                        onClick={() => setCurrentWeek(prev => Math.max(1, prev - 1))}
                        className="p-2 bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-600 rounded-lg text-white transition-colors"
                        disabled={currentWeek === 1}
                     >
                         <ChevronLeft size={20} />
                     </button>
                     <div className="text-center">
                         <span className="text-xs font-bold text-purple-400 uppercase tracking-widest block mb-1">Cronograma Atual</span>
                         <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white">SEMANA {currentWeek}</h2>
                     </div>
                     <button 
                        onClick={() => setCurrentWeek(prev => prev + 1)}
                        className="p-2 bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-600 rounded-lg text-white transition-colors"
                     >
                         <ChevronRight size={20} />
                     </button>
                </div>

                {/* 2. DAY SELECTOR (Seg-Dom) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 overflow-hidden">
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-7 text-center">
                        {WEEK_DAYS.map(day => {
                            const isSelected = currentDay === day;
                            const isWeekend = day === 'Sábado' || day === 'Domingo';
                            return (
                                <button
                                    key={day}
                                    onClick={() => setCurrentDay(day)}
                                    className={`
                                        py-4 text-sm font-bold transition-colors relative
                                        ${isSelected ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-700 hover:text-white'}
                                        ${isWeekend && !isSelected ? 'bg-slate-900/50' : ''}
                                    `}
                                >
                                    <span className="hidden md:inline">{day}</span>
                                    <span className="md:hidden">{day.slice(0, 3)}</span>
                                    {isSelected && <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-1 bg-white/50"></div>}
                                </button>
                            );
                        })}
                    </div>
                </div>

                {/* 3. SUBJECTS FOR THE DAY (FILTERED BY WEEK) */}
                <div className="space-y-6">
                    {dailyPlan.length === 0 && (
                        <div className="p-8 text-center text-slate-500 bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-slate-700">
                            Dia Livre! Aproveite para descansar ou adiantar revisões.
                        </div>
                    )}

                    {dailyPlan.map(plan => {
                        const { subject, topic, totalTopics } = plan;
                        const progress = getSubjectProgress(subject);
                        
                        return (
                            <div key={subject} className="bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 overflow-hidden shadow-lg transition-all hover:border-purple-500/30">
                                {/* Subject Header */}
                                <div className="p-5 bg-slate-900/80 border-b border-slate-700 flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                                        <div className="p-2 bg-purple-900/50 text-purple-400 rounded-lg border border-purple-500/30">
                                            <BookMarked size={20} />
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white tracking-wide">{subject}</h3>
                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                                                <div className="w-24 h-1.5 bg-slate-700 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                                    <div className="h-full bg-purple-500 transition-all duration-500" style={{width: `${progress}%`}}></div>
                                                </div>
                                                <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 font-mono">{progress}% Concluído</span>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <span className="text-xs bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 font-mono">
                                        Aula {currentWeek} / {totalTopics}
                                    </span>
                                </div>

                                {/* Current Week Topic */}
                                <div className="p-6">
                                    {!topic ? (
                                        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 text-slate-500">
                                            <CheckCircle className="mb-2 opacity-50" size={32} />
                                            <p className="font-medium">Conteúdo desta matéria finalizado!</p>
                                            <p className="text-sm">Parabéns, você completou todos os tópicos cadastrados.</p>
                                        </div>
                                    ) : (
                                        <button
                                            onClick={() => toggleTopic(topic.id)}
                                            className={`w-full text-left p-5 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all group flex items-start gap-4 
                                                ${topic.completed 
                                                    ? 'bg-purple-900/10 border-purple-500/30' 
                                                    : 'bg-slate-700/30 border-slate-600 hover:border-purple-400 hover:bg-slate-700/50'
                                                }`}
                                        >
                                            <div className={`mt-0.5 transition-all ${topic.completed ? 'text-purple-400' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`}>
                                                {topic.completed ? <CheckSquare size={24} /> : <Square size={24} />}
                                            </div>
                                            <div>
                                                <span className="block text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-1 text-slate-400">
                                                    Tópico da Semana {currentWeek}
                                                </span>
                                                <span className={`text-lg font-medium transition-colors leading-relaxed ${topic.completed ? 'text-slate-500 line-through decoration-slate-600' : 'text-white'}`}>
                                                    {topic.topic}
                                                </span>
                                            </div>
                                        </button>
                                    )}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        );
                    })}
                </div>

                {/* Logs Section (NOW LAST) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 h-fit mt-4">
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <History size={18} className="text-purple-400" /> Histórico de Estudos (Cronômetro)
                    </h3>
                    <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
                        {studyLogs.length === 0 && <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Nenhum estudo cronometrado registrado nas tarefas.</p>}
                        {studyLogs.map(log => (
                            <div key={log.id} className="border-l-2 border-purple-500 pl-3 py-1 group">
                                <p className="text-white font-medium text-sm group-hover:text-purple-300 transition-colors">{log.title}</p>
                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-1">
                                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{new Date(log.date).toLocaleDateString()}</p>
                                    <span className="text-[10px] bg-purple-900/50 text-purple-300 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">{log.durationMinutes} min</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

        {/* Footer Space */}
        <div className="mt-8 pt-8 border-t border-slate-800/50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-600 gap-2 pb-8">
            <div className="w-1 h-1 bg-slate-700 rounded-full"></div>
            <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold opacity-50">Nexus 360</p>
            <ChevronDown className="animate-bounce opacity-30 mt-2" size={16} />
        </div>
    </div>
  );
};

payload.text:
No domingo, quero que você deixe apenas as matérias que têm mais aulas. São as aulas que preciso ter mais profundidade para eliminar o quanto antes. Um exemplo, eu vi que história tem bastante, então ela pode repetir no sábado. Quero que você veja quais são as que mais têm aulas para poder repetir no sábado e no domingo, por favor.

As que tiverem poucas, não precisa colocar no sábado nem no domingo. Exemplo: português eu vi que tem poucas.

**Optimizing the Weekend Schedule**

I'm now diving into the core logic. My focus is on the weekend study plan and how to modify it. Subjects with a heavier workload, with more topics, get more time. It is a simple relationship I have identified.


**Refining the Subject Allocation**

Now, I'm adjusting the weekend plan based on subject topic counts. Subjects with numerous topics, like History and Math, will be scheduled for both Saturday and Sunday, for a faster rate of completion. I am not repeating subjects with only a few topics. I am looking at the data, I can see that Portuguese and English/Spanish, are low-volume subjects. The list I provided for Physics is indeed quite short.


**Analyzing Subject Volumes**

I've just finished the raw subject volume count, pulled directly from the provided source. "High volume" subjects, demanding more weekend time, are now clearly identified: History, Math, and Sociology are the primary contenders. Geography and Portuguese are middle tier, but Portuguese might be removed from the weekend as requested. Now I'll proceed with allocating weekend time based on this revised data.


**Evaluating Weekend Allocation**

I'm now focusing on re-evaluating the weekend schedule, based on the identified subject volumes. I've taken the existing structure and the user's constraints into account. Subjects like History, with a high volume of topics, must be prioritized for weekend inclusion. I'm actively working on removing low-volume subjects. I'm now drafting a new proposal.


**Prioritizing Weekend Subjects**

I'm now prioritizing subjects for the weekend based on topic count, aiming for focused subject sessions. My top priority subjects for the weekend are History, Sociology, and Mathematics. I've set up my Saturday as History and Sociology, and Sunday to be Mathematics, with the other subjects assigned to another time. Science subjects, Physics, Chemistry, and Biology, are on hold for now because of a smaller volume.


**Modifying the Weekend Plan**

I've just focused on modifying the weekend plan. I'm removing Physics, Chemistry, Biology and Law from Sunday to keep the focus on larger subjects. I'll maintain **REDAÇÃO** and **QUESTÕES** for practice, even though they were previously off. I am updating `SCHEDULE` constant and `localStorage` to `v6` to deploy the changes. Now I'm actively writing the updated schedule object in `components/Body.tsx`.


**Confirming Subject Priorities**

I'm now confirming the final weekend subject list against the user's explicit constraints. I've re-examined the prompt: ensuring subjects with higher lecture counts, like Math, History and Sociology, are the primary weekend subjects, while lighter subjects are removed. "REDAÇÃO" and "QUESTÕES" will remain for practice. The new schedule is almost ready to be integrated into the program.

Com base na sua análise lógica (focando no volume de tópicos no banco de dados), reestruturei o fim de semana.

**Análise dos Volumes:**
1.  **HISTÓRIA:** 53 tópicos (Volume Altíssimo) -> **Repete Sábado**
2.  **MATEMÁTICA:** 48 tópicos (Volume Altíssimo) -> **Repete Domingo**
3.  **SOCIOLOGIA:** 38 tópicos (Volume Alto) -> **Repete Sábado**
4.  *Demais matérias (Português, Geografia, Física, etc.):* Têm entre 7 e 20 tópicos. Considerei "volume baixo/médio" comparado às acima, portanto, foram **removidas** do fim de semana para focar na eliminação das grandes.

**Novo Cronograma de Fim de Semana:**
*   **Sábado:** Foco intensivo em Humanas (apenas as extensas: História e Sociologia).
*   **Domingo:** Foco intensivo em Exatas (apenas a extensa: Matemática) + Prática (Redação/Questões).

Atualizei a versão do banco de dados para `v6` para aplicar essas mudanças imediatamente.

entries.description: Optimized weekend schedule to focus only on high-volume subjects (History, Sociology, Math) based on topic count, removing lower volume subjects like Portuguese from weekends. Bumped storage version to v6.

export const Body: React.FC<BodyProps> = ({ workoutLogs, tasks }) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'body' | 'mind'>('body');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  // --- WORKOUT STATE ---
  const [workoutProfile, setWorkoutProfile] = useState<WorkoutProfile | null>(null);
  const [workoutFormData, setWorkoutFormData] = useState<Partial<WorkoutProfile>>({
    sex: 'Masculino', age: 30, weight: 75, goal: 'hypertrophy', limitations: 'Nenhuma'
  });
  const [workoutPlan, setWorkoutPlan] = useState<any>(null);

  // --- STUDY STATE ---
  const [studyTopics, setStudyTopics] = useState<StudyTopic[]>(() => {
      // BUMPED VERSION TO v6 TO FORCE SYLLABUS UPDATE (Optimized Weekend Schedule)
      const saved = localStorage.getItem('nexus_study_topics_v6');
      if (saved) return JSON.parse(saved);
      
      // Initialize raw syllabus into stateful topics
      return RAW_SYLLABUS.map((item, index) => ({
          id: `topic_${index}`,
          subject: item.s,
          topic: item.t,
          completed: false
      }));
  });

  const [currentDay, setCurrentDay] = useState<string>(WEEK_DAYS[new Date().getDay() === 0 ? 6 : new Date().getDay() - 1]);
  const [currentWeek, setCurrentWeek] = useState<number>(1);

  useEffect(() => {
      localStorage.setItem('nexus_study_topics_v6', JSON.stringify(studyTopics));
  }, [studyTopics]);

  // --- HANDLERS ---
  const handleGenerateWorkout = async () => {
    if (!workoutFormData.age) return;
    const p = workoutFormData as WorkoutProfile;
    setWorkoutProfile(p);
    setLoading(true);
    const aiPlan = await generateWorkoutPlan(p);
    setWorkoutPlan(aiPlan);
    setLoading(false);
  };

  const toggleTopic = (id: string) => {
      setStudyTopics(prev => prev.map(t => 
          t.id === id ? { ...t, completed: !t.completed } : t
      ));
  };

  // Logic: Get subjects for the day, then find the SPECIFIC topic for the current week (1 topic per week logic)
  const getDailyPlan = () => {
      const subjects = SCHEDULE[currentDay] || [];
      
      return subjects.map(subject => {
          // Get all topics for this subject
          const allTopicsForSubject = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject);
          
          // Determine which topic corresponds to the current week
          // Week 1 -> Index 0, Week 2 -> Index 1, etc.
          const topicIndex = currentWeek - 1;
          
          // If we have ran out of topics, return null or a generic review
          const specificTopic = allTopicsForSubject[topicIndex];
          
          return {
              subject,
              topic: specificTopic,
              totalTopics: allTopicsForSubject.length
          };
      });
  };

  const getSubjectProgress = (subject: string) => {
      const total = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject).length;
      if (total === 0) return 0;
      const done = studyTopics.filter(t => t.subject === subject && t.completed).length;
      return Math.round((done / total) * 100);
  };

  // Filter study tasks for the history log
  const studyLogs = tasks.filter(t => t.category === 'study' && t.completed).sort((a,b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());

  const dailyPlan = getDailyPlan();

  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-8 h-full flex flex-col gap-6 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">
        
        {/* --- HEADER: LARGE SPLIT BUTTONS --- */}
        <div className="flex w-full gap-4 md:gap-8 h-32 md:h-40 shrink-0">
            {/* LEFT SIDE: BODY */}
            <button 
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('body')}
                className={`flex-1 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 group relative overflow-hidden ${
                    activeTab === 'body' 
                    ? 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)]' 
                    : 'bg-slate-800/50 border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:border-slate-600 opacity-60 hover:opacity-100'
                }`}
            >
                {activeTab === 'body' && <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/10 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>}
                <Dumbbell size={32} className={`transition-transform duration-300 ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'scale-110 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 group-hover:text-emerald-400'}`} />
                <div>
                    <span className={`text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest block ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-emerald-400'}`}>CORPO</span>
                    <span className={`text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] block text-center ${activeTab === 'body' ? 'text-emerald-200' : 'text-slate-600'}`}>Alta Performance</span>
                </div>
            </button>

            {/* RIGHT SIDE: MIND */}
            <button 
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('mind')}
                className={`flex-1 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 group relative overflow-hidden ${
                    activeTab === 'mind' 
                    ? 'bg-purple-600 border-purple-400 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(147,51,234,0.3)]' 
                    : 'bg-slate-800/50 border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:border-slate-600 opacity-60 hover:opacity-100'
                }`}
            >
                {activeTab === 'mind' && <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/10 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>}
                <Brain size={32} className={`transition-transform duration-300 ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'scale-110 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`} />
                <div>
                    <span className={`text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest block ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`}>MENTE</span>
                    <span className={`text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] block text-center ${activeTab === 'mind' ? 'text-purple-200' : 'text-slate-600'}`}>Cognição & Estudo</span>
                </div>
            </button>
        </div>

        {/* --- BODY TAB CONTENT (WORKOUT) --- */}
        {activeTab === 'body' && (
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-8 animate-fade-in flex-1">
                
                {/* Generator Section (NOW FIRST) */}
                <div className="w-full space-y-6">
                    {!workoutPlan ? (
                         <div className="bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 space-y-4 shadow-lg">
                            <h3 className="text-white font-bold flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-slate-700 pb-2 mb-2">
                                <Zap className="text-emerald-500"/> Gerador de Protocolo Físico
                            </h3>
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                                <div>
                                    <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Peso (kg)</label>
                                    <input type="number" value={workoutFormData.weight} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, weight: Number(e.target.value)})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors" />
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Idade</label>
                                    <input type="number" value={workoutFormData.age} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, age: Number(e.target.value)})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors" />
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div>
                                <label className="block text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase font-bold mb-1">Objetivo Principal</label>
                                <select value={workoutFormData.goal} onChange={(e) => setWorkoutFormData({...workoutFormData, goal: e.target.value as any})} className="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded p-3 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors">
                                    <option value="hypertrophy">Hipertrofia (Ganho de Massa)</option>
                                    <option value="weight_loss">Perda de Gordura / Definição</option>
                                    <option value="conditioning">Condicionamento Atlético</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>

                            <button 
                                onClick={handleGenerateWorkout}
                                disabled={loading}
                                className="w-full bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-white font-bold py-4 rounded-lg flex justify-center items-center gap-2 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-emerald-900/20 mt-2"
                            >
                                {loading ? <RotateCcw className="animate-spin" /> : <Activity />}
                                {loading ? 'Processando Biotipo...' : 'Gerar Plano de Treino IA'}
                            </button>
                         </div>
                    ) : (
                        <div className="space-y-4 animate-fade-in">
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-emerald-900/20 p-4 rounded-xl border border-emerald-500/30">
                                 <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-emerald-400 flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <CheckCircle size={20}/> {workoutPlan.focus}
                                 </h3>
                                 <span className="text-emerald-300 font-mono text-sm bg-emerald-900/50 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-emerald-500/30">{workoutPlan.durationMinutes} min</span>
                            </div>
                             <div className="flex justify-end">
                                <button onClick={() => setWorkoutPlan(null)} className="text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white underline">Gerar Novo Protocolo</button>
                             </div>

                            <div className="grid gap-4">
                                {workoutPlan.exercises?.map((ex: any, idx: number) => (
                                    <div key={idx} className="bg-slate-800 p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 hover:border-emerald-500/50 transition-colors flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-start md:items-center">
                                        <div className="bg-slate-900 text-slate-400 w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full font-bold text-xs shrink-0 border border-slate-700">
                                            {idx + 1}
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="flex-1">
                                            <h4 className="font-bold text-white text-lg mb-1">{ex.name}</h4>
                                            <p className="text-sm text-emerald-400/80 italic flex items-start gap-2">
                                                <Lightbulb size={14} className="shrink-0 mt-0.5" /> {ex.tip}
                                            </p>
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="flex gap-2 text-sm text-slate-300 font-mono shrink-0">
                                            <span className="bg-slate-900 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-slate-700 text-center min-w-[80px]">{ex.sets} Séries</span>
                                            <span className="bg-slate-900 px-3 py-1 rounded border border-slate-700 text-center min-w-[80px]">{ex.reps} Reps</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    )}
                </div>

                {/* Logs Section (NOW LAST) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 h-fit">
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <History size={18} className="text-emerald-400" /> Histórico de Treinos
                    </h3>
                    <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
                        {workoutLogs.length === 0 && <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Nenhum treino registrado via Chat ainda.</p>}
                        {workoutLogs.slice().reverse().map(log => (
                            <div key={log.id} className="border-l-2 border-emerald-500 pl-3 py-1">
                                <p className="text-white font-medium text-sm">{log.description}</p>
                                <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{new Date(log.date).toLocaleString()}</p>
                            </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

        {/* --- MIND TAB CONTENT (FIXED STUDY CHECKLIST) --- */}
        {activeTab === 'mind' && (
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 animate-fade-in flex-1">
                
                {/* 1. WEEK CONTROLLER */}
                <div className="bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 p-4 flex items-center justify-between">
                     <button 
                        onClick={() => setCurrentWeek(prev => Math.max(1, prev - 1))}
                        className="p-2 bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-600 rounded-lg text-white transition-colors"
                        disabled={currentWeek === 1}
                     >
                         <ChevronLeft size={20} />
                     </button>
                     <div className="text-center">
                         <span className="text-xs font-bold text-purple-400 uppercase tracking-widest block mb-1">Cronograma Atual</span>
                         <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white">SEMANA {currentWeek}</h2>
                     </div>
                     <button 
                        onClick={() => setCurrentWeek(prev => prev + 1)}
                        className="p-2 bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-600 rounded-lg text-white transition-colors"
                     >
                         <ChevronRight size={20} />
                     </button>
                </div>

                {/* 2. DAY SELECTOR (Seg-Dom) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 overflow-hidden">
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-7 text-center">
                        {WEEK_DAYS.map(day => {
                            const isSelected = currentDay === day;
                            const isWeekend = day === 'Sábado' || day === 'Domingo';
                            return (
                                <button
                                    key={day}
                                    onClick={() => setCurrentDay(day)}
                                    className={`
                                        py-4 text-sm font-bold transition-colors relative
                                        ${isSelected ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-700 hover:text-white'}
                                        ${isWeekend && !isSelected ? 'bg-slate-900/50' : ''}
                                    `}
                                >
                                    <span className="hidden md:inline">{day}</span>
                                    <span className="md:hidden">{day.slice(0, 3)}</span>
                                    {isSelected && <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-1 bg-white/50"></div>}
                                </button>
                            );
                        })}
                    </div>
                </div>

                {/* 3. SUBJECTS FOR THE DAY (FILTERED BY WEEK) */}
                <div className="space-y-6">
                    {dailyPlan.length === 0 && (
                        <div className="p-8 text-center text-slate-500 bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-slate-700">
                            Dia Livre! Aproveite para descansar ou adiantar revisões.
                        </div>
                    )}

                    {dailyPlan.map(plan => {
                        const { subject, topic, totalTopics } = plan;
                        const progress = getSubjectProgress(subject);
                        
                        return (
                            <div key={subject} className="bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 overflow-hidden shadow-lg transition-all hover:border-purple-500/30">
                                {/* Subject Header */}
                                <div className="p-5 bg-slate-900/80 border-b border-slate-700 flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                                        <div className="p-2 bg-purple-900/50 text-purple-400 rounded-lg border border-purple-500/30">
                                            <BookMarked size={20} />
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white tracking-wide">{subject}</h3>
                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                                                <div className="w-24 h-1.5 bg-slate-700 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                                    <div className="h-full bg-purple-500 transition-all duration-500" style={{width: `${progress}%`}}></div>
                                                </div>
                                                <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 font-mono">{progress}% Concluído</span>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <span className="text-xs bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 font-mono">
                                        Aula {currentWeek} / {totalTopics}
                                    </span>
                                </div>

                                {/* Current Week Topic */}
                                <div className="p-6">
                                    {!topic ? (
                                        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 text-slate-500">
                                            <CheckCircle className="mb-2 opacity-50" size={32} />
                                            <p className="font-medium">Conteúdo desta matéria finalizado!</p>
                                            <p className="text-sm">Parabéns, você completou todos os tópicos cadastrados.</p>
                                        </div>
                                    ) : (
                                        <button
                                            onClick={() => toggleTopic(topic.id)}
                                            className={`w-full text-left p-5 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all group flex items-start gap-4 
                                                ${topic.completed 
                                                    ? 'bg-purple-900/10 border-purple-500/30' 
                                                    : 'bg-slate-700/30 border-slate-600 hover:border-purple-400 hover:bg-slate-700/50'
                                                }`}
                                        >
                                            <div className={`mt-0.5 transition-all ${topic.completed ? 'text-purple-400' : 'text-slate-500 group-hover:text-purple-400'}`}>
                                                {topic.completed ? <CheckSquare size={24} /> : <Square size={24} />}
                                            </div>
                                            <div>
                                                <span className="block text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-1 text-slate-400">
                                                    Tópico da Semana {currentWeek}
                                                </span>
                                                <span className={`text-lg font-medium transition-colors leading-relaxed ${topic.completed ? 'text-slate-500 line-through decoration-slate-600' : 'text-white'}`}>
                                                    {topic.topic}
                                                </span>
                                            </div>
                                        </button>
                                    )}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        );
                    })}
                </div>

                {/* Logs Section (NOW LAST) */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 h-fit mt-4">
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <History size={18} className="text-purple-400" /> Histórico de Estudos (Cronômetro)
                    </h3>
                    <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
                        {studyLogs.length === 0 && <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Nenhum estudo cronometrado registrado nas tarefas.</p>}
                        {studyLogs.map(log => (
                            <div key={log.id} className="border-l-2 border-purple-500 pl-3 py-1 group">
                                <p className="text-white font-medium text-sm group-hover:text-purple-300 transition-colors">{log.title}</p>
                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-1">
                                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{new Date(log.date).toLocaleDateString()}</p>
                                    <span className="text-[10px] bg-purple-900/50 text-purple-300 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">{log.durationMinutes} min</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

        {/* Footer Space */}
        <div className="mt-8 pt-8 border-t border-slate-800/50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-600 gap-2 pb-8">
            <div className="w-1 h-1 bg-slate-700 rounded-full"></div>
            <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold opacity-50">Nexus 360</p>
            <ChevronDown className="animate-bounce opacity-30 mt-2" size={16} />
        </div>
    </div>
  );
};

payload.text:
- Instead of placing studies by weeks, I would like them to be placed by modules.
- Module one, module two, module three.
- And have a productivity report also in the reports tab, regarding the studies.
- So that I can see my progress.
- In addition to on the page, the studies that have my performance, what I have already studied, and what I need to focus on more.
- But, in the reports tab on the dashboard, it should also appear.
- And as I tick off the checklist, it should also simultaneously appear in the reports.
- Please.

**Revising the Structure**

Okay, I'm analyzing the user's request. My focus is on restructuring the study guide. The core change centers around transitioning the organization from "Weeks" to a "Modules" format. This involves dissecting the existing structure and re-mapping it to a new, more modular arrangement. I've begun to list out these goals, and I am considering the implications of this change and preparing a more fleshed-out answer.


**Analyzing the Data Flow**

I'm now diving into the code changes. I'm focusing on the data flow and how it impacts the existing structure. Specifically, I'm thinking about the implications for "StudyTopic" in `types.ts`. I believe I can keep the existing structure but alter the grouping logic in `Body.tsx` to accommodate the new module-based design. The state changes needed in `components/Body.tsx` also are top of mind. I will have to find a way to make progress reports and checklists sync up in real-time.


**Modifying the UI**

I'm now revising the user interface for modules. My plan is to display "Módulo X" instead of "Semana X" in the header. To achieve this, I'll update the display text. Also, I will add a new "Study Progress" section in `Reports.tsx` which will need access to the `studyTopics` to populate checklists. I've begun to consider how to filter and display the topics accordingly, and where the new progress section should reside in `Body.tsx`.


**Centralizing State Management**

I'm now focusing on state management. I need to move the `studyTopics` state up to `App.tsx` and pass it down as props. My priority is to keep `studyTopics` accessible to both `Body` and `Reports`. I have to drill down the props, including functions to modify this state. I also need to make sure that the type declarations are updated appropriately. Specifically, I'm updating `types.ts`, `BodyProps`, and `ReportsProps`. Finally, I am considering progress bars per subject.


**Integrating the Components**

I'm now integrating the updated components. I'm focusing on updating `Body.tsx` to accept `studyTopics` and `onToggleTopic` as props and removing its internal state for topics. I will update UI labels, changing "SEMANA" to "MÓDULO." I plan to add a local "Performance Summary" section. I will also make sure `Reports.tsx` correctly displays progress per subject, now that it accepts `studyTopics` as a prop.


**Generating Progress Visuals**

I'm now generating progress visuals, and I'm updating the `Reports.tsx` component. I'm calculating progress per subject using the updated `studyTopics` data, now accessible as props. This involves mapping subjects to their progress percentages, which I plan to display in bar charts. I'm considering using progress bars for a more intuitive user experience. Finally, I've checked the type definitions, and have concluded that no strictly needed changes are required there.


**Extracting Data Sources**

I'm now extracting the `RAW_SYLLABUS` data. I've decided to move it to `App.tsx` (or `constants.ts`) to initialize state there and keep a unified place for it. I will keep it in `App.tsx` for minimal file changes. Also, I'm updating `Body.tsx` and `Reports.tsx` to receive props. I am also planning the new "Module X" visuals. I'll need a summary card for overall progress. I'm starting to refine those reports.


**Finalizing UI Integration**

I'm now integrating the "Desempenho Acadêmico" section. Given user feedback, I'm appending "Progresso de Estudos" to the Overview tab for now. I've moved the RAW_SYLLABUS data to App.tsx and refined the "Module X" visuals. My structure is set: App.tsx manages state, passes it to Body and Reports. Body displays modules, and Reports shows performance charts.


**Analyzing Module Navigation**

I'm now determining how modules should drive the user experience. The daily schedule likely remains, mapping content *within* a module to a day. The key is to shift the unit of progression from weeks to modules. So, I will rename "Week" to "Module" in the UI. Also, I'll allow explicit module navigation or a list of all topics in a module, regardless of the day. Finally, a "Global Progress" view seems helpful.


**Updating the Report Visuals**

I'm now implementing the progress bar visualization in `Reports.tsx`. The bars will reflect completion percentages per subject, leveraging the updated data flow. This involves modifying `Reports.tsx`, accepting `studyTopics` data as a prop, and crafting the progress bars. I'm also ensuring the "Performance" and "Focus" sections are in sync with user expectations. Finally, I'm verifying the data's integrity and preparing to generate the final HTML.

Para atender ao seu pedido de organizar os estudos por **Módulos**, centralizar o progresso e exibir relatórios detalhados, precisei fazer uma reestruturação importante na arquitetura do aplicativo.

**O que foi feito:**

1.  **Centralização dos Dados (`App.tsx`):** A lista de conteúdos (Syllabus) e o estado dos tópicos (concluído/não concluído) foram movidos do componente `Body` para o `App` principal. Isso permite que os dados sejam compartilhados entre a aba de Estudos (`Body`) e a aba de Relatórios (`Reports`) em tempo real.
2.  **Atualização da Aba Mente (`Body.tsx`):**
    *   Mudei a nomenclatura de "Semana" para **"Módulo"**.
    *   Adicionei um **Painel de Desempenho Rápido** no topo da aba, mostrando o progresso geral e o que falta no módulo atual.
    *   Mantive a lógica de dias da semana (pois é um cronograma diário), mas agora o conteúdo avança por Módulos.
3.  **Atualização dos Relatórios (`Reports.tsx`):**
    *   Criei uma nova seção exclusiva **"Desempenho Acadêmico"**.
    *   Adicionei gráficos de barra mostrando a porcentagem de conclusão de cada matéria (Ex: História 10%, Matemática 5%).
    *   Isso permite ver exatamente quais matérias estão atrasadas (precisam de foco) e quais estão adiantadas.

// Helper hook for LocalStorage persistence
function useStickyState<T>(defaultValue: T, key: string): [T, React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<T>>] {
  const [value, setValue] = useState<T>(() => {
    const stickyValue = window.localStorage.getItem(key);
    return stickyValue !== null ? JSON.parse(stickyValue) : defaultValue;
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    window.localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
  }, [key, value]);

  return [value, setValue];
}
