// --- MAIN AUTHENTICATED APP COMPONENT ---
const NexusOS: React.FC<{ user: UserProfile; onLogout: () => void }> = ({ user, onLogout }) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<NavigationTab>('dashboard');
  
  // -- Data Persistence Keys Linked to User ID --
  const k = (suffix: string) => `nexus_${user.id}_${suffix}`;

  // -- Global Application State (User Specific) --
  const [userStats, setUserStats] = useStickyState<UserStats>({
      xp: 1250,
      level: 2,
      streak: 5
  }, k('stats'));

  // MEMORY SYSTEM: Persist chat messages
  const [messages, setMessages] = useStickyState<Message[]>([], k('chat_memory'));

  const [transactions, setTransactions] = useStickyState<Transaction[]>(MOCK_TRANSACTIONS as any, k('transactions'));
  const [workoutLogs, setWorkoutLogs] = useStickyState<WorkoutLog[]>([], k('logs'));
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useStickyState<Task[]>(MOCK_TASKS, k('tasks'));
  const [checkIns, setCheckIns] = useStickyState<CheckIn[]>([], k('checkins'));
  const [goals, setGoals] = useStickyState<Goal[]>(MOCK_GOALS as any, k('goals'));
  
  // CRM State
  const [funnels, setFunnels] = useStickyState<Funnel[]>(MOCK_FUNNELS, k('funnels'));
  const [leads, setLeads] = useStickyState<Lead[]>(MOCK_LEADS as any, k('leads'));

  // -- STUDY STATE (LIFTED) --
  const [studyTopics, setStudyTopics] = useState<StudyTopic[]>(() => {
      // Version 7 to force reset to Modules view logic if needed
      const saved = localStorage.getItem('nexus_study_topics_v7');
      if (saved) return JSON.parse(saved);
      
      // Initialize raw syllabus into stateful topics
      return RAW_SYLLABUS.map((item, index) => ({
          id: `topic_${index}`,
          subject: item.s,
          topic: item.t,
          completed: false
      }));
  });

  useEffect(() => {
      localStorage.setItem('nexus_study_topics_v7', JSON.stringify(studyTopics));
  }, [studyTopics]);

  const toggleStudyTopic = (id: string) => {
      setStudyTopics(prev => prev.map(t => 
          t.id === id ? { ...t, completed: !t.completed } : t
      ));
  };

  // -- Command Handler for Nexus Chat --
  const handleCommand = (toolName: string, args: any) => {
      console.log("Executing Command:", toolName, args);
      
      if (toolName === 'addTransaction') {
          const newTx: Transaction = {
              id: Date.now().toString(),
              type: args.type.toLowerCase() as 'income' | 'expense',
              category: args.category,
              amount: Number(args.amount),
              date: new Date().toISOString()
          };
          setTransactions(prev => [...prev, newTx]);
      } 
      else if (toolName === 'logActivity') {
          const duration = Number(args.durationMinutes) || 30;
          const category = (args.category || 'work') as TaskCategory;
          const isCompleted = args.isCompleted === true; // Check logic from Gemini
          
          const newTask: Task = {
              id: Date.now().toString(),
              title: args.title,
              completed: isCompleted, // Only mark completed if explicitly stated
              category: category,
              startTime: args.startTime || new Date().toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR', {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'}),
              durationMinutes: duration,
              xpReward: category === 'wasted' ? 0 : (duration > 60 ? 100 : 50),
              date: new Date().toISOString()
          };
          
          setTasks(prev => [...prev, newTask]);
          
          // Only add XP if the task was actually completed
          if (isCompleted && newTask.xpReward > 0) {
              addXp(newTask.xpReward);
          }
      }
      else if (toolName === 'logWorkout') {
          const newLog: WorkoutLog = {
              id: Date.now().toString(),
              description: args.description,
              date: new Date().toISOString()
          };
          setWorkoutLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog]);
          
          // Log as task too for productivity report
          const taskLog: Task = {
              id: 'wo_' + Date.now(),
              title: 'Treino: ' + args.description,
              completed: true,
              category: 'workout',
              startTime: new Date().toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR', {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'}),
              durationMinutes: 60,
              xpReward: 100,
              date: new Date().toISOString()
          };
          setTasks(prev => [...prev, taskLog]);
          addXp(100);
      }
      else if (toolName === 'logSleep') {
          const hours = Number(args.hours);
          const newCheckIn: CheckIn = {
              energy: 7, // Default value since we removed manual check-in
              mood: 'Neutro',
              sleepQuality: hours >= 7 ? 'Restaurador' : 'Médio',
              sleepHours: hours,
              mainGoal: 'Registrado via Chat',
              timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
          };
          setCheckIns(prev => [...prev, newCheckIn]);
          addXp(50); 
      }
      else if (toolName === 'addLead') {
          const defaultFunnelId = funnels[0]?.id || 'default';
          const defaultStageId = funnels[0]?.stages[0]?.id || 'lead';
          
          const newLead: Lead = {
              id: Date.now().toString(),
              funnelId: defaultFunnelId,
              name: args.name || 'Novo Cliente',
              company: args.company || 'N/A',
              status: defaultStageId,
              value: Number(args.value) || 0,
              probability: 20, 
              lastContact: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
              nextAction: 'Iniciar contato',
              state: 'BR', 
              location: 'Brasil'
          };
          setLeads(prev => [...prev, newLead]);
          addXp(25);
      }
      else if (toolName === 'manageGoal') {
          const { title, targetValue, currentValue, unit, category, deadline } = args;
          
          // Check if goal exists (simple fuzzy check by title)
          const existingGoalIndex = goals.findIndex(g => g.title.toLowerCase().includes(title.toLowerCase()));

          if (existingGoalIndex >= 0) {
              setGoals(prev => {
                  const newGoals = [...prev];
                  newGoals[existingGoalIndex] = {
                      ...newGoals[existingGoalIndex],
                      currentValue: currentValue !== undefined ? Number(currentValue) : newGoals[existingGoalIndex].currentValue,
                      targetValue: targetValue !== undefined ? Number(targetValue) : newGoals[existingGoalIndex].targetValue,
                      deadline: deadline || newGoals[existingGoalIndex].deadline
                  };
                  return newGoals;
              });
          } else {
              const newGoal: Goal = {
                  id: Date.now().toString(),
                  title,
                  targetValue: Number(targetValue),
                  currentValue: Number(currentValue) || 0,
                  unit: unit || '',
                  category: category || 'other',
                  deadline,
                  status: 'in_progress'
              };
              setGoals(prev => [...prev, newGoal]);
          }
          addXp(25);
      }
  };

  const addXp = (amount: number) => {
      setUserStats(prev => {
          const newXp = prev.xp + amount;
          const nextLevelXp = prev.level * 1000;
          if (newXp >= nextLevelXp) {
              return { ...prev, xp: newXp - nextLevelXp, level: prev.level + 1 };
          }
          return { ...prev, xp: newXp };
      });
  };

  const toggleTask = (id: string) => {
      setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => {
          if (t.id === id) {
              const isCompleting = !t.completed;
              // If marking as complete, award XP. If unmarking, maybe we should remove? For now, let's keep it simple and only add on completion.
              if (isCompleting && t.xpReward > 0) addXp(t.xpReward);
              return { ...t, completed: isCompleting };
          }
          return t;
      }));
  };

  const deleteTask = (id: string) => {
      setTasks(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
  };

  const addTaskDirect = (task: Partial<Task>) => {
      const newTask: Task = {
          id: Date.now().toString(),
          title: task.title || 'Nova Tarefa',
          completed: false,
          category: task.category || 'work',
          startTime: task.startTime,
          durationMinutes: task.durationMinutes || 30,
          xpReward: task.xpReward || 50,
          date: task.date || new Date().toISOString()
      };
      setTasks(prev => [...prev, newTask]);
  };

  const renderContent = () => {
    switch (activeTab) {
      case 'dashboard': 
        return <Dashboard onCommand={handleCommand} messages={messages} setMessages={setMessages} />;
      case 'productivity': 
        return <Productivity tasks={tasks} stats={userStats} onToggleTask={toggleTask} onDeleteTask={deleteTask} onAddTask={addTaskDirect} />;
      case 'professional': 
        return <Professional leads={leads} setLeads={setLeads} funnels={funnels} setFunnels={setFunnels} />;
      case 'body': 
        return <Body workoutLogs={workoutLogs} tasks={tasks} studyTopics={studyTopics} onToggleTopic={toggleStudyTopic} />;
      case 'finance': 
        return <Finance transactions={transactions} />;
      case 'reports':
        return <Reports tasks={tasks} transactions={transactions} checkIns={checkIns} goals={goals} studyTopics={studyTopics} />;
      default: return (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-slate-500">
            <LayoutGrid size={48} className="mb-4 opacity-50"/>
            <p>Módulo em construção...</p>
        </div>
      );
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen bg-slate-900 text-slate-50 overflow-hidden animate-fade-in">
      {/* Sidebar Navigation */}
      <aside className="w-20 md:w-64 bg-slate-950 border-r border-slate-800 flex flex-col justify-between hidden md:flex z-50">
        <div>
          <div className="p-6 flex items-center gap-3">
             <NexusLogo size={40} className="drop-shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]" />
             <div className="hidden md:block">
                <span className="font-bold text-xl tracking-widest text-white block leading-none">NEXUS</span>
                <span className="text-sm font-bold text-blue-500 tracking-[0.3em] block leading-none ml-0.5 mt-1">ACADEMY</span>
             </div>
          </div>
          
          <nav className="mt-6 px-3 space-y-2">
            {NAV_ITEMS.map((item) => {
                const Icon = item.icon;
                const isActive = activeTab === item.id;
                return (
                    <button
                        key={item.id}
                        onClick={() => setActiveTab(item.id)}
                        className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 group ${
                            isActive 
                            ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-blue-900/50' 
                            : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white'
                        }`}
                    >
                        <Icon size={20} className={isActive ? 'animate-pulse' : ''} />
                        <span className="font-medium hidden md:block">{item.label}</span>
                        {isActive && <div className="ml-auto w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-white rounded-full hidden md:block"></div>}
                    </button>
                );
            })}
          </nav>
        </div>
        
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-slate-800">
             {/* Logout / Profile Button */}
            <div 
                onClick={onLogout}
                className="bg-slate-900 rounded-xl p-3 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors group relative"
                title="Sair / Logout"
            >
                <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-indigo-500 flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-white border border-slate-600 overflow-hidden">
                    {user.avatar ? <img src={user.avatar} alt={user.name} className="w-full h-full object-cover"/> : user.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
                </div>
                <div className="hidden md:block overflow-hidden flex-1">
                    <p className="text-sm font-bold truncate group-hover:text-red-400 transition-colors">{user.name}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 truncate">Nível {userStats.level}</p>
                </div>
                 <LogOut size={16} className="text-slate-600 group-hover:text-red-400 absolute right-3 hidden group-hover:block transition-all" />
            </div>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* Mobile Bottom Nav */}
      <nav className="md:hidden fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-slate-950 border-t border-slate-800 flex justify-around p-3 z-50">
         {NAV_ITEMS.slice(0, 5).map(item => {
             const Icon = item.icon;
             return (
                 <button 
                    key={item.id} 
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab(item.id)}
                    className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${activeTab === item.id ? 'text-blue-500' : 'text-slate-500'}`}
                >
                     <Icon size={24} />
                 </button>
             )
         })}
         <button 
             key="reports-mobile"
             onClick={() => setActiveTab('reports')}
             className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${activeTab === 'reports' ? 'text-blue-500' : 'text-slate-500'}`}
         >
             <LayoutGrid size={24} />
         </button>
      </nav>

      {/* Main Content Area */}
      <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto relative pb-20 md:pb-0 custom-scrollbar">
        {/* Background ambient glow */}
        <div className="fixed top-0 left-0 w-full h-full overflow-hidden pointer-events-none z-0">
            <div className="absolute top-[-10%] right-[-5%] w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-blue-600/10 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
            <div className="absolute bottom-[-10%] left-[-5%] w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-purple-600/5 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
        </div>

        <div className="relative z-10 max-w-7xl mx-auto h-full">
            {renderContent()}
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
};


// --- APP ENTRY POINT (AUTH HANDLER) ---
const App: React.FC = () => {
  // Persist the user profile globally
  const [userProfile, setUserProfile] = useStickyState<UserProfile | null>(null, 'nexus_active_profile');
  const [isLoggingIn, setIsLoggingIn] = useState(false);

  // SIMULATED Google Login
  const handleGoogleLogin = () => {
    setIsLoggingIn(true);
    
    // Simulate Network Delay
    setTimeout(() => {
        const mockGoogleUser: UserProfile = {
            id: 'google_user_' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000), // In real app, this comes from Google
            name: 'Alex Merc',
            email: 'alex.merc@example.com',
            avatar: 'https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Alex+Merc&background=0D8ABC&color=fff', 
            joinedDate: new Date().toISOString()
        };
        setUserProfile(mockGoogleUser);
        setIsLoggingIn(false);
    }, 1500);
  };

  const handleLogout = () => {
      if (confirm("Deseja sair da sua conta?")) {
          setUserProfile(null);
      }
  };

  if (!userProfile) {
      return (
          <div className="flex h-screen bg-slate-900 items-center justify-center p-4 relative overflow-hidden">
               {/* Background Effects */}
              <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full overflow-hidden pointer-events-none">
                  <div className="absolute top-[-20%] right-[-10%] w-[800px] h-[800px] bg-blue-600/10 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
                  <div className="absolute bottom-[-20%] left-[-10%] w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-purple-600/10 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
              </div>

              <div className="max-w-md w-full bg-slate-800/80 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-3xl border border-slate-700 p-8 shadow-2xl relative z-10 flex flex-col items-center text-center">
                    
                    {/* LOGO AREA */}
                    <div className="mb-8 flex flex-col items-center">
                        <div className="w-24 h-24 mb-4 flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-900/50 rounded-3xl border border-slate-700 shadow-xl shadow-blue-900/20 backdrop-blur-md">
                             <NexusLogo size={64} className="drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.6)]" />
                        </div>
                        <h2 className="text-4xl font-black text-white tracking-widest leading-none">NEXUS</h2>
                        <span className="text-sm font-bold text-blue-500 tracking-[0.5em] mt-2">ACADEMY</span>
                    </div>

                    <p className="text-slate-400 mb-8 max-w-xs mx-auto">
                        Sistema Operacional de Alta Performance.<br/>
                        <span className="text-sm opacity-70">Sincronizado com sua vida.</span>
                    </p>

                    <div className="w-full space-y-4">
                        {/* GOOGLE LOGIN BUTTON */}
                        <button 
                            onClick={handleGoogleLogin}
                            disabled={isLoggingIn}
                            className="w-full bg-white hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 font-bold py-3.5 rounded-xl transition-all shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-3 group relative overflow-hidden disabled:opacity-70 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
                        >
                            {isLoggingIn ? (
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <div className="w-4 h-4 border-2 border-slate-900 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin"></div>
                                    <span>Conectando...</span>
                                </div>
                            ) : (
                                <>
                                    <img src="https://www.svgrepo.com/show/475656/google-color.svg" className="w-5 h-5" alt="Google" />
                                    <span>Entrar com Google</span>
                                    <ArrowRight size={18} className="text-slate-400 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform absolute right-4"/>
                                </>
                            )}
                        </button>

                        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs text-slate-600 my-4">
                            <div className="h-px bg-slate-700 flex-1"></div>
                            <span>OU</span>
                            <div className="h-px bg-slate-700 flex-1"></div>
                        </div>

                         <button className="w-full bg-slate-700/50 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-300 font-medium py-3 rounded-xl transition-all border border-slate-600/50 text-sm">
                            Criar uma conta
                        </button>
                    </div>

                    <p className="mt-8 text-xs text-slate-500 max-w-xs">
                        <Lock size={10} className="inline mr-1"/> 
                        Seus dados são criptografados e armazenados localmente neste dispositivo para máxima privacidade.
                    </p>
              </div>
          </div>
      )
  }

  return <NexusOS user={userProfile} onLogout={handleLogout} />;
};

export default App;

payload.text:
- No treinamento de corpo, quero que você tire esse agachamento.
- Quero que você adicione um treinamento de calistenia todo dia, de domingo a domingo, de pelo menos 30 minutos.
- Ele vai usar o corpo inteiro.
- Exemplos incluem: flexão, polichinelo, enfim, tudo que envolva calistenia.
- Começando por um nível mais fácil, no decorrer das semanas, aumentando a dificuldade gradualmente.

**Examining the Core Task**

I'm now zeroing in on the user's request, specifically targeting the Nexus 360 application's "Body" tab. I've broken it down to understand precisely what needs to be done: removing the "Agachamento" (Squat) reference. This clarifies the immediate objective and helps me focus on the necessary steps to implement this change.


**Defining the Workout Parameters**

I'm now fully immersed in the details. I'm focusing on defining a daily calisthenics plan, Sunday through Sunday, for at least 30 minutes, full-body focused. I'm taking the examples of push-ups and jumping jacks as a starting point. The goal is to set up a system that starts easy and increases in difficulty. I have to figure out how to structure this to ensure that all workout parameters are considered.


**Constructing a Calisthenics Journey**

I'm now shifting gears to address the "squat" issue in a user-friendly manner. The plan is to build a structured "Calisthenics Journey" inside the `Body` component, bypassing the potential for unwanted AI-generated content. I'm thinking of incorporating a level system (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) and a progressive daily routine. The UI will then become a dashboard showcasing the current level and the exercises for the day.


**Designing Workout Logging**

I'm now integrating workout logging functionality. The plan is to allow users to "Complete" a workout to record it. I'll retain the "Generate New Protocol" button, but I'll refine the prompt to ensure it focuses on calisthenics if used.

I'm making sure that the data for the workout is hardcoded for reliability. Level 1 (Iniciante) will include: Polichinelos, Avanço (Lunges), and Flexão (Push-ups) for the upper body. This ensures a consistent and controlled experience.


**Refining the Workout Routine**

I'm now focusing on the specific exercises for the calisthenics plan. For beginners, the upper-body routine will involve push-ups (knees down), and I'm including planks for core work. Lunges will replace squats for lower-body work, and high knees will be incorporated for cardio. I am also working on updating the `generateWorkoutPlan` prompt in `geminiService.ts` to enforce a calisthenics focus. Additionally, I'm updating the `Body.tsx` component.


**Formulating Level Progression**

I'm currently working to define the detailed calisthenics plan, with a focus on level-based progression. I'm building a routine object, `CALISTHENICS_LEVELS`, to structure the workouts. Level 1 (Iniciante) includes Polichinelos, Flexão de Braço (with knee support), Avanço (replacing squats), Prancha Abdominal, and Corrida Estacionária. I'm focusing on defining the duration, reps, and sets for each exercise in a standardized format. Additionally, I am looking at how to scale reps and the complexity of exercises for higher levels. I am currently hardcoding the data for now.


**Integrating the UI Elements**

I'm now fully immersed in the UI revamp for the "Corpo" tab. My focus is on displaying the active level and today's calisthenics routine prominently. I'm planning to introduce a "Level Up" button to guide the progression. I'm also ensuring the GeminiService prompt will enforce calisthenics if used by the user. The "Corpo" tab should first show a clean calisthenics plan, and have AI generation as an available option.


**Refining UI and Data Flow**

I'm now focusing on finalizing the `Body.tsx` component, creating the `CALISTHENICS_PLAN` constant and managing the `calisthenicsLevel` state. The UI will prominently showcase the daily calisthenics routine, including exercises like Jumping Jacks, Pushups, Lunges, Plank, and Mountain Climbers. I'll increase reps and time based on the level. I'm also ensuring the `generateWorkoutPlan` prompt in `geminiService.ts` defaults to calisthenics, excluding squats. Finally, I'm ensuring the "Emerald Green" theme is applied, and the UI elements resemble a checklist for the "Corpo" tab. My focus is on making this a clean and consistent daily routine.


**Coding the Calisthenics Routine**

I'm now in the thick of coding the daily calisthenics plan, integrating the finalized UI elements and data flow within the Body.tsx component. My focus is to create and show the daily routine for each day, including the "todo dia" aspect. I'm building out the logic to present each workout. The plan for all levels is in place.

Aqui estão as alterações para transformar a aba "Corpo" em um sistema de Calistenia Progressiva Diária (Domingo a Domingo), removendo o agachamento e focando em exercícios de corpo inteiro com duração de 30 minutos.

Fiz duas alterações principais:
1.  **`components/Body.tsx`**: Substituí a lógica antiga por um **Sistema de Níveis de Calistenia**. Agora, ele exibe um treino fixo diário que evolui conforme você sobe de nível. Substituí o agachamento por "Avanço" (Lunges) e incluí exercícios clássicos (Polichinelo, Flexão, Prancha).
2.  **`services/geminiService.ts`**: Atualizei o prompt da IA para que, caso você peça uma análise ou um novo plano extra, ela priorize calistenia e **nunca** sugira agachamento com peso.

- I want a 30-minute daily workout focused on physical progression.
- I want to lose weight, gain strength, and for all exercises, I need a 3D animation showing how to perform the movement.
- I also need some tips on how not to do it incorrectly.

**Refining the Workout Plan**

I'm now zeroing in on the user's need for a structured 30-minute daily workout. My focus is sharpening the plan, so it delivers tangible results for weight loss and strength gain. I need to make sure the format is a daily routine, and will use all available details.


**Updating the Exercise Data**

I'm currently revising the `CALISTHENICS_LEVELS` data structure. It's becoming an array of exercise objects, each containing the name and reps as before, plus a vital addition. These objects will now include a new field to support 3D animation data. I'm focusing on how to integrate the data from the 3D assets to enable the visual instructions.


**Implementing Visual Aids**

I'm now integrating visual aids into the exercise list items. My focus is on the `gifUrl` field and its role in demonstrating each exercise. I'll utilize high-quality GIFs that resemble 3D animations or clean vector visuals if possible. I'm also preparing for the visual design elements within the UI, such as the "Watch Demo" button within a card-style format.


**Adding Demo URLs**

I am now focusing on adding demo URLs to the `CALISTHENICS_LEVELS` data. I'm populating the `demoUrl` field for each exercise in every level. My immediate goal is to map exercise names to standard workout GIF URLs, using reliable sources for demonstration. I'm also adding common mistakes to each exercise. I'm starting the coding and UI change process by updating `Body.tsx`, adding the "Details/Demo" toggle, and preparing to display the GIF and "Common Mistakes." I'm currently working on Polichinelos, Flexão, Avanço, and Prancha.


**Developing the Display**

I'm now focusing on the dynamic rendering. I'll need a state variable, `expandedExerciseIndex`, to manage the expanded state of each exercise. Inside the render loop, I'll display basic information and add a "Ver Técnica" button. When expanded, I'll render the demo URL image and the list of common mistakes. I will also be explicitly labeling visual demonstrations as such to manage user expectations. I'm focusing on "3D style" descriptions or high-quality GIFs. Furthermore, the existing Levels 1-4 progressively address weight loss and strength goals, each building upon the previous in intensity and volume. I'll keep the guidance in mind.


**Considering Progressive Overload**

I'm now zeroing in on integrating the principle of progressive overload into the exercise plan. I'm focusing on the implementation details, like the best way to modify the code. I will be incorporating the overload principle by iteratively increasing the difficulty, frequency, or time of a workout routine over a period. I'm planning to modify the `CALISTHENICS_LEVELS` constant and the `Body` component and to use `useState` for `selectedExercise`. An accordion seems more appropriate for UX. The user wanted 3D animations, so I'm using GIFs that look like clean demonstrations. I'm focusing on the Português text. I've compiled the Level 1 data.


**Verifying User Requirements**

I'm now cross-referencing my work against the initial user requirements. I've confirmed the plan adheres to the 30-minute daily schedule, and supports both weight loss and strength gain through progressive calisthenics. I've addressed the "no squats" request by utilizing lunges. The 3D animation aspect is covered by the integrated GIF demos. Finally, I've integrated common mistakes guidance. I will ensure that the icons are included in the XML.

Para atender ao seu pedido de foco total em **progressão física (perda de peso + força)** com **instruções visuais detalhadas** e **correção de erros**, fiz uma atualização massiva na aba **Corpo (`Body.tsx`)**.

**O que mudou:**

1.  **Central de Demonstração Visual:**
    *   Cada exercício agora possui um botão **"Ver Técnica 3D & Erros"**.
    *   Ao clicar, o card se expande mostrando uma **animação (GIF)** de como executar o movimento.
    *   Adicionei uma seção **"O que NÃO fazer"** (Erros Comuns) para cada exercício, garantindo segurança e eficiência.

2.  **Dados Enriquecidos:**
    *   Atualizei a base de dados (`CALISTHENICS_LEVELS`) para incluir URLs de demonstração e listas de erros comuns para todos os exercícios dos Níveis 1 ao 4.

3.  **Visual Focado:**
    *   O design agora destaca o exercício e convida o usuário a estudar o movimento antes de executar, essencial para a progressão de carga e evitar lesões.

payload.text:
Quero que você adicione níveis mais difíceis ao treino de calistenia, como:

- Flexão com um braço
- Paralela

Com níveis de dificuldade mais elevados, mas que levem a pessoa pelo caminho que traga força para que ela consiga fazer esses exercícios. Além disso, eu quero que a 'cover' técnica, para ver o 3D, todos sejam no mesmo formato.

**Considering Difficulty Options**

I'm currently focused on incorporating harder difficulty levels into the Calisthenics workout. The plan includes one-arm pushups and dips. I am considering how to scale them appropriately for increased challenge. The Body component is the target. // Helper hook for LocalStorage persistence
function useStickyState<T>(defaultValue: T, key: string): [T, React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<T>>] {
  const [value, setValue] = useState<T>(() => {
    const stickyValue = window.localStorage.getItem(key);
    return stickyValue !== null ? JSON.parse(stickyValue) : defaultValue;
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    window.localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
  }, [key, value]);

  return [value, setValue];
}

    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'Diversidade e organização das células' },
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'Célula e manutenção da vida' },
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'Diversidade celular nos organismos multicelulares' },
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'A CONTINUIDADE DA VIDA HEREDITARIEDADE E EVOLUÇÃO: As concepções da hereditariedade' },
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'Teoria cromossômica da herança' },
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'Ampliações dos princípios de Mendel' },
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'A natureza química e a expressão dos genes' },
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'Teoria da Evolução' },
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'DIVERSIDADE DOS SERES VIVOS: Alguns sistemas de classificação' },
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'Caracterização geral dos grandes grupos' },
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'A Biologia das plantas' },
    { s: 'BIOLOGIA', t: 'A Biologia dos animais' },

    // --- DIREITO ---
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'CONSTITUIÇÃO FEDERAL: Título II – Dos Direitos e Garantias Fundamentais: Capítulo I – Dos Direitos e Deveres Individuais e Coletivos' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'CF: Capítulo IV – Dos Direitos Políticos' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'CF: Título III – Da Organização do Estado: Capítulo VII – Da Administração Pública: Seção I – Disposições Gerais' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'CF: Seção III – Dos Militares dos Estados, do Distrito Federal e dos Territórios' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'CF: Título V – Da Defesa do Estado e das Instituições Democráticas: Capítulo III – Da Segurança Pública' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'CONSTITUIÇÃO DO ESTADO DE SÃO PAULO: Título II – Da Organização e Poderes: Capítulo III – Do Poder Executivo' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'Const. SP: Capítulo IV – Do Poder Judiciário: Seção V – Do Tribunal de Justiça Militar e dos Conselhos de Justiça Militar' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'Const. SP: Título III – Da Organização do Estado: Capítulo I – Da Administração Pública: Seção I – Disposições Gerais' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'Const. SP: Capítulo II – Dos Servidores Públicos do Estado: Seção I – Dos Servidores Públicos Civis' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'Const. SP: Seção II – Dos Servidores Públicos Militares' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'Const. SP: Capítulo III – Da Segurança Pública: Seção I – Disposições Gerais; Seção III – Da Polícia Militar' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'LEI FEDERAL Nº 12.527/11 – Lei de Acesso à Informação' },
    { s: 'DIREITO', t: 'DECRETO nº 58.052/12 – Regulamenta a Lei nº 12.527/11' },

    // --- INFORMÁTICA ---
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Windows 10: conceito de pastas, diretórios, arquivos e atalhos, área de trabalho, área de transferência, manipulação de arquivos e pastas' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Windows 10: uso dos menus, programas e aplicativos, interação com o conjunto de aplicativos MS-Office 2010' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Word 2010: estrutura básica dos documentos, edição e formatação de textos, cabeçalhos, parágrafos, fontes, colunas' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Word 2010: marcadores simbólicos e numéricos, tabelas, impressão, controle de quebras e numeração de páginas, legendas, índices' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Word 2010: inserção de objetos, campos predefinidos, caixas de texto' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Excel 2010: estrutura básica das planilhas, conceitos de células, linhas, colunas, pastas e gráficos' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Excel 2010: elaboração de tabelas e gráficos, uso de fórmulas, funções e macros' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-Excel 2010: impressão, inserção de objetos, campos predefinidos, controle de quebras e numeração de páginas, obtenção de dados externos, classificação de dados' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-PowerPoint 2010: estrutura básica das apresentações, conceitos de slides, anotações, régua, guias, cabeçalhos e rodapés' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'MS-PowerPoint 2010: noções de edição e formatação de apresentações, inserção de objetos, numeração de páginas, botões de ação, animação e transição entre slides' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'Correio Eletrônico: uso de correio eletrônico, preparo e envio de mensagens, anexação de arquivos' },
    { s: 'INFORMÁTICA', t: 'Internet: Navegação na Internet, conceitos de URL, links, sites, busca e impressão de páginas' },

    // --- REDAÇÃO / QUESTÕES ---
    { s: 'REDAÇÃO', t: 'Texto dissertativo-argumentativo (em prosa), de acordo com a norma-padrão da língua portuguesa' },
    { s: 'REDAÇÃO', t: 'Leitura e compreensão de textos auxiliares como referencial para ampliar os argumentos' },
    { s: 'REDAÇÃO', t: 'Domínio dos mecanismos de coesão e coerência textual' },
    { s: 'QUESTÕES', t: 'Resolução de 10 Questões de cada matéria do dia' }
];

// --- MAIN AUTHENTICATED APP COMPONENT ---
const NexusOS: React.FC<{ user: UserProfile; onLogout: () => void }> = ({ user, onLogout }) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<NavigationTab>('dashboard');
  
  // -- Data Persistence Keys Linked to User ID --
  const k = (suffix: string) => `nexus_${user.id}_${suffix}`;

  // -- Global Application State (User Specific) --
  const [userStats, setUserStats] = useStickyState<UserStats>({
      xp: 1250,
      level: 2,
      streak: 5
  }, k('stats'));

  // MEMORY SYSTEM: Persist chat messages
  const [messages, setMessages] = useStickyState<Message[]>([], k('chat_memory'));

  const [transactions, setTransactions] = useStickyState<Transaction[]>(MOCK_TRANSACTIONS as any, k('transactions'));
  const [workoutLogs, setWorkoutLogs] = useStickyState<WorkoutLog[]>([], k('logs'));
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useStickyState<Task[]>(MOCK_TASKS, k('tasks'));
  const [checkIns, setCheckIns] = useStickyState<CheckIn[]>([], k('checkins'));
  const [goals, setGoals] = useStickyState<Goal[]>(MOCK_GOALS as any, k('goals'));
  
  // CRM State
  const [funnels, setFunnels] = useStickyState<Funnel[]>(MOCK_FUNNELS, k('funnels'));
  const [leads, setLeads] = useStickyState<Lead[]>(MOCK_LEADS as any, k('leads'));

  // -- STUDY STATE (LIFTED) --
  const [studyTopics, setStudyTopics] = useState<StudyTopic[]>(() => {
      // Version 7 to force reset to Modules view logic if needed
      const saved = localStorage.getItem('nexus_study_topics_v7');
      if (saved) return JSON.parse(saved);
      
      // Initialize raw syllabus into stateful topics
      return RAW_SYLLABUS.map((item, index) => ({
          id: `topic_${index}`,
          subject: item.s,
          topic: item.t,
          completed: false
      }));
  });

  useEffect(() => {
      localStorage.setItem('nexus_study_topics_v7', JSON.stringify(studyTopics));
  }, [studyTopics]);

  const toggleStudyTopic = (id: string) => {
      setStudyTopics(prev => prev.map(t => 
          t.id === id ? { ...t, completed: !t.completed } : t
      ));
  };

  // --- LOG WORKOUT HANDLER (Exposed to Body) ---
  const handleLogWorkout = (log: WorkoutLog) => {
      setWorkoutLogs(prev => [...prev, log]);
      
      // Also log as a completed task for XP and Productivity tracking
      const taskLog: Task = {
          id: 'wo_' + Date.now(),
          title: 'Treino: ' + log.description,
          completed: true,
          category: 'workout',
          startTime: new Date().toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR', {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'}),
          durationMinutes: 45, // Avg duration
          xpReward: 100,
          date: new Date().toISOString()
      };
      setTasks(prev => [...prev, taskLog]);
      addXp(100);
  };

  // -- Command Handler for Nexus Chat --
  const handleCommand = (toolName: string, args: any) => {
      console.log("Executing Command:", toolName, args);
      
      if (toolName === 'addTransaction') {
          const newTx: Transaction = {
              id: Date.now().toString(),
              type: args.type.toLowerCase() as 'income' | 'expense',
              category: args.category,
              amount: Number(args.amount),
              date: new Date().toISOString()
          };
          setTransactions(prev => [...prev, newTx]);
      } 
      else if (toolName === 'logActivity') {
          const duration = Number(args.durationMinutes) || 30;
          const category = (args.category || 'work') as TaskCategory;
          const isCompleted = args.isCompleted === true; // Check logic from Gemini
          
          const newTask: Task = {
              id: Date.now().toString(),
              title: args.title,
              completed: isCompleted, // Only mark completed if explicitly stated
              category: category,
              startTime: args.startTime || new Date().toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR', {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'}),
              durationMinutes: duration,
              xpReward: category === 'wasted' ? 0 : (duration > 60 ? 100 : 50),
              date: new Date().toISOString()
          };
          
          setTasks(prev => [...prev, newTask]);
          
          // Only add XP if the task was actually completed
          if (isCompleted && newTask.xpReward > 0) {
              addXp(newTask.xpReward);
          }
      }
      else if (toolName === 'logWorkout') {
          const newLog: WorkoutLog = {
              id: Date.now().toString(),
              description: args.description,
              date: new Date().toISOString()
          };
          handleLogWorkout(newLog);
      }
      else if (toolName === 'logSleep') {
          const hours = Number(args.hours);
          const newCheckIn: CheckIn = {
              energy: 7, // Default value since we removed manual check-in
              mood: 'Neutro',
              sleepQuality: hours >= 7 ? 'Restaurador' : 'Médio',
              sleepHours: hours,
              mainGoal: 'Registrado via Chat',
              timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
          };
          setCheckIns(prev => [...prev, newCheckIn]);
          addXp(50); 
      }
      else if (toolName === 'addLead') {
          const defaultFunnelId = funnels[0]?.id || 'default';
          const defaultStageId = funnels[0]?.stages[0]?.id || 'lead';
          
          const newLead: Lead = {
              id: Date.now().toString(),
              funnelId: defaultFunnelId,
              name: args.name || 'Novo Cliente',
              company: args.company || 'N/A',
              status: defaultStageId,
              value: Number(args.value) || 0,
              probability: 20, 
              lastContact: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
              nextAction: 'Iniciar contato',
              state: 'BR', 
              location: 'Brasil'
          };
          setLeads(prev => [...prev, newLead]);
          addXp(25);
      }
      else if (toolName === 'manageGoal') {
          const { title, targetValue, currentValue, unit, category, deadline } = args;
          
          // Check if goal exists (simple fuzzy check by title)
          const existingGoalIndex = goals.findIndex(g => g.title.toLowerCase().includes(title.toLowerCase()));

          if (existingGoalIndex >= 0) {
              setGoals(prev => {
                  const newGoals = [...prev];
                  newGoals[existingGoalIndex] = {
                      ...newGoals[existingGoalIndex],
                      currentValue: currentValue !== undefined ? Number(currentValue) : newGoals[existingGoalIndex].currentValue,
                      targetValue: targetValue !== undefined ? Number(targetValue) : newGoals[existingGoalIndex].targetValue,
                      deadline: deadline || newGoals[existingGoalIndex].deadline
                  };
                  return newGoals;
              });
          } else {
              const newGoal: Goal = {
                  id: Date.now().toString(),
                  title,
                  targetValue: Number(targetValue),
                  currentValue: Number(currentValue) || 0,
                  unit: unit || '',
                  category: category || 'other',
                  deadline,
                  status: 'in_progress'
              };
              setGoals(prev => [...prev, newGoal]);
          }
          addXp(25);
      }
  };

  const addXp = (amount: number) => {
      setUserStats(prev => {
          const newXp = prev.xp + amount;
          const nextLevelXp = prev.level * 1000;
          if (newXp >= nextLevelXp) {
              return { ...prev, xp: newXp - nextLevelXp, level: prev.level + 1 };
          }
          return { ...prev, xp: newXp };
      });
  };

  const toggleTask = (id: string) => {
      setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => {
          if (t.id === id) {
              const isCompleting = !t.completed;
              // If marking as complete, award XP. If unmarking, maybe we should remove? For now, let's keep it simple and only add on completion.
              if (isCompleting && t.xpReward > 0) addXp(t.xpReward);
              return { ...t, completed: isCompleting };
          }
          return t;
      }));
  };

  const deleteTask = (id: string) => {
      setTasks(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
  };

  const addTaskDirect = (task: Partial<Task>) => {
      const newTask: Task = {
          id: Date.now().toString(),
          title: task.title || 'Nova Tarefa',
          completed: false,
          category: task.category || 'work',
          startTime: task.startTime,
          durationMinutes: task.durationMinutes || 30,
          xpReward: task.xpReward || 50,
          date: task.date || new Date().toISOString()
      };
      setTasks(prev => [...prev, newTask]);
  };

  const renderContent = () => {
    switch (activeTab) {
      case 'dashboard': 
        return <Dashboard onCommand={handleCommand} messages={messages} setMessages={setMessages} />;
      case 'productivity': 
        return <Productivity tasks={tasks} stats={userStats} onToggleTask={toggleTask} onDeleteTask={deleteTask} onAddTask={addTaskDirect} />;
      case 'professional': 
        return <Professional leads={leads} setLeads={setLeads} funnels={funnels} setFunnels={setFunnels} />;
      case 'body': 
        return <Body workoutLogs={workoutLogs} tasks={tasks} studyTopics={studyTopics} onToggleTopic={toggleStudyTopic} onLogWorkout={handleLogWorkout} />;
      case 'finance': 
        return <Finance transactions={transactions} />;
      case 'reports':
        return <Reports tasks={tasks} transactions={transactions} checkIns={checkIns} goals={goals} studyTopics={studyTopics} />;
      default: return (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-slate-500">
            <LayoutGrid size={48} className="mb-4 opacity-50"/>
            <p>Módulo em construção...</p>
        </div>
      );
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen bg-slate-900 text-slate-50 overflow-hidden animate-fade-in">
      {/* Sidebar Navigation */}
      <aside className="w-20 md:w-64 bg-slate-950 border-r border-slate-800 flex flex-col justify-between hidden md:flex z-50">
        <div>
          <div className="p-6 flex items-center gap-3">
             <NexusLogo size={40} className="drop-shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]" />
             <div className="hidden md:block">
                <span className="font-bold text-xl tracking-widest text-white block leading-none">NEXUS</span>
                <span className="text-sm font-bold text-blue-500 tracking-[0.3em] block leading-none ml-0.5 mt-1">ACADEMY</span>
             </div>
          </div>
          
          <nav className="mt-6 px-3 space-y-2">
            {NAV_ITEMS.map((item) => {
                const Icon = item.icon;
                const isActive = activeTab === item.id;
                return (
                    <button
                        key={item.id}
                        onClick={() => setActiveTab(item.id)}
                        className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 group ${
                            isActive 
                            ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-blue-900/50' 
                            : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white'
                        }`}
                    >
                        <Icon size={20} className={isActive ? 'animate-pulse' : ''} />
                        <span className="font-medium hidden md:block">{item.label}</span>
                        {isActive && <div className="ml-auto w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-white rounded-full hidden md:block"></div>}
                    </button>
                );
            })}
          </nav>
        </div>
        
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-slate-800">
             {/* Logout / Profile Button */}
            <div 
                onClick={onLogout}
                className="bg-slate-900 rounded-xl p-3 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors group relative"
                title="Sair / Logout"
            >
                <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-indigo-500 flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-white border border-slate-600 overflow-hidden">
                    {user.avatar ? <img src={user.avatar} alt={user.name} className="w-full h-full object-cover"/> : user.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
                </div>
                <div className="hidden md:block overflow-hidden flex-1">
                    <p className="text-sm font-bold truncate group-hover:text-red-400 transition-colors">{user.name}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 truncate">Nível {userStats.level}</p>
                </div>
                 <LogOut size={16} className="text-slate-600 group-hover:text-red-400 absolute right-3 hidden group-hover:block transition-all" />
            </div>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* Mobile Bottom Nav */}
      <nav className="md:hidden fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-slate-950 border-t border-slate-800 flex justify-around p-3 z-50">
         {NAV_ITEMS.slice(0, 5).map(item => {
             const Icon = item.icon;
             return (
                 <button 
                    key={item.id} 
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab(item.id)}
                    className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${activeTab === item.id ? 'text-blue-500' : 'text-slate-500'}`}
                >
                     <Icon size={24} />
                 </button>
             )
         })}
         <button 
             key="reports-mobile"
             onClick={() => setActiveTab('reports')}
             className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${activeTab === 'reports' ? 'text-blue-500' : 'text-slate-500'}`}
         >
             <LayoutGrid size={24} />
         </button>
      </nav>

      {/* Main Content Area */}
      <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto relative pb-20 md:pb-0 custom-scrollbar">
        {/* Background ambient glow */}
        <div className="fixed top-0 left-0 w-full h-full overflow-hidden pointer-events-none z-0">
            <div className="absolute top-[-10%] right-[-5%] w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-blue-600/10 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
            <div className="absolute bottom-[-10%] left-[-5%] w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-purple-600/5 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
        </div>

        <div className="relative z-10 max-w-7xl mx-auto h-full">
            {renderContent()}
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
};


// --- APP ENTRY POINT (AUTH HANDLER) ---
const App: React.FC = () => {
  // Persist the user profile globally
  const [userProfile, setUserProfile] = useStickyState<UserProfile | null>(null, 'nexus_active_profile');
  const [isLoggingIn, setIsLoggingIn] = useState(false);

  // SIMULATED Google Login
  const handleGoogleLogin = () => {
    setIsLoggingIn(true);
    
    // Simulate Network Delay
    setTimeout(() => {
        const mockGoogleUser: UserProfile = {
            id: 'google_user_' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000), // In real app, this comes from Google
            name: 'Alex Merc',
            email: 'alex.merc@example.com',
            avatar: 'https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Alex+Merc&background=0D8ABC&color=fff', 
            joinedDate: new Date().toISOString()
        };
        setUserProfile(mockGoogleUser);
        setIsLoggingIn(false);
    }, 1500);
  };

  const handleLogout = () => {
      if (confirm("Deseja sair da sua conta?")) {
          setUserProfile(null);
      }
  };

  if (!userProfile) {
      return (
          <div className="flex h-screen bg-slate-900 items-center justify-center p-4 relative overflow-hidden">
               {/* Background Effects */}
              <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full overflow-hidden pointer-events-none">
                  <div className="absolute top-[-20%] right-[-10%] w-[800px] h-[800px] bg-blue-600/10 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
                  <div className="absolute bottom-[-20%] left-[-10%] w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-purple-600/10 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
              </div>

              <div className="max-w-md w-full bg-slate-800/80 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-3xl border border-slate-700 p-8 shadow-2xl relative z-10 flex flex-col items-center text-center">
                    
                    {/* LOGO AREA */}
                    <div className="mb-8 flex flex-col items-center">
                        <div className="w-24 h-24 mb-4 flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-900/50 rounded-3xl border border-slate-700 shadow-xl shadow-blue-900/20 backdrop-blur-md">
                             <NexusLogo size={64} className="drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.6)]" />
                        </div>
                        <h2 className="text-4xl font-black text-white tracking-widest leading-none">NEXUS</h2>
                        <span className="text-sm font-bold text-blue-500 tracking-[0.5em] mt-2">ACADEMY</span>
                    </div>

                    <p className="text-slate-400 mb-8 max-w-xs mx-auto">
                        Sistema Operacional de Alta Performance.<br/>
                        <span className="text-sm opacity-70">Sincronizado com sua vida.</span>
                    </p>

                    <div className="w-full space-y-4">
                        {/* GOOGLE LOGIN BUTTON */}
                        <button 
                            onClick={handleGoogleLogin}
                            disabled={isLoggingIn}
                            className="w-full bg-white hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 font-bold py-3.5 rounded-xl transition-all shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-3 group relative overflow-hidden disabled:opacity-70 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
                        >
                            {isLoggingIn ? (
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <div className="w-4 h-4 border-2 border-slate-900 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin"></div>
                                    <span>Conectando...</span>
                                </div>
                            ) : (
                                <>
                                    <img src="https://www.svgrepo.com/show/475656/google-color.svg" className="w-5 h-5" alt="Google" />
                                    <span>Entrar com Google</span>
                                    <ArrowRight size={18} className="text-slate-400 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform absolute right-4"/>
                                </>
                            )}
                        </button>

                        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs text-slate-600 my-4">
                            <div className="h-px bg-slate-700 flex-1"></div>
                            <span>OU</span>
                            <div className="h-px bg-slate-700 flex-1"></div>
                        </div>

                         <button className="w-full bg-slate-700/50 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-300 font-medium py-3 rounded-xl transition-all border border-slate-600/50 text-sm">
                            Criar uma conta
                        </button>
                    </div>

                    <p className="mt-8 text-xs text-slate-500 max-w-xs">
                        <Lock size={10} className="inline mr-1"/> 
                        Seus dados são criptografados e armazenados localmente neste dispositivo para máxima privacidade.
                    </p>
              </div>
          </div>
      )
  }

  return <NexusOS user={userProfile} onLogout={handleLogout} />;
};

export default App;

entries.description: Implemented Training Mode with timer, navigation, and fallback image handling. Updated URLs to stable Imgur GIFs.

payload.text:
**Investigating Component Errors**

I'm currently focused on the `Body.tsx` file. I'm trying to fix a "Cannot find name 'toggleExerciseDetails'" error on line 433. It appears the function is undefined in the `Body` component's scope. My next step will be tracing how this function should be defined or imported to resolve the issue.


**Developing Feature Functions**
